bibl.title: Text of Kṛṣṇa Miśra's Prabodhacandrodaya (कृष्णमिश्र प्रबोधचन्द्रोदय) as edited by Matthew Kapstein

sourceDesc.note: Differences from the text printed in Clay are primarily (1) more standard IAST representation without Clay sandhi-and-compound notations, and (2) chāyā placed adjacent to corresponding Prakrit.

editorialDecl.p: I (T. Neill) produced this HANSEL edition by manually converting M. Kapstein's submitted Word file into plain text, standardizing some punctuation, and adding structural markup for HANSEL. The text may still contain errors and needs a final proofread.

The source edition is printed in Devanāgarī; the electronic text uses lossless IAST transliteration. IAST differs slightly from ISO 15919; conversion can be achieved via:
ṛ → r̥
ḷ → l̥
ḻ → ḷ
ṃ → ṁ
e → ē
o → ō

Corrections and uncertainties:
Replacement: before after
Deletion:
Addition:
Unclear:

revisionDesc.change: Edited text based primarily on 1936 Trivandrum edition (see CSL vol. intro p. liii) plus some more material not found in the Kerala recension and sourced from other editions. Formatted as Word document.

lg.l: madhyāhnārkamarīcikāsv iva payaḥpūro yad ajñānataḥ,khaṃ vāyur jvalano jalaṃ kṣitir iti trailokyam unmīlati |
yat tattvaṃ viduṣāṃ nimīlati punaḥ, sragbhogibhogopamaṃ,sāndrānandam upāsmahe tad amalaṃ svātmāvabodhaṃ mahaḥ ||

lg.head: api ca —
lg.l: antarnāḍīniyamitamarullaṅghitabrahmarandhraṃ,svānte śāntipraṇayini samunmīlad ānandasāndram, |
pratyagjyotir jayati yaminaḥ spaṣṭalālāṭanetravyājavya kti ktī kṛtam iva jagad vyāpi candrārdhamauleḥ ||

sp.speaker: sūtradhāraḥ
sp.p: alam ativistareṇa! ādiṣṭo 'smi — sakalasāmantacakracūḍāmaṇimarīcimañjarīnīrājitacaraṇakamalena; balavadarinivahavakṣaḥsthalakavāṭapāṭanaprakaṭitanṛsiṃharūpeṇa; prabalataranarapatikulapralayamahārṇavanimagnamedinīsamuddharaṇopanītamahāvaraharūpeṇa; sakaladigvilāsinīkarṇapūrīkṛtakīrtilatāpallavena; samastāśāstamberamakarṇatālāsphālanabahalapavanasampātapravardhitapratāpānalena — śrīmatā gopalena, yathā khalv — “asya sahajasuhṛdo rājñaḥ kīrtivarmadevasya digvijayavyāpārāntaritaparabrahmānandair asmābhiḥ samunmīlitavividhaviṣamaviṣayarasāsvādadūṣitā ivātivāhitā divasāḥ | idānīṃ tu kṛtakṛtyā vayam | yataḥ —

lg.l: nītāḥ kṣayaṃ kṣitibhujo nṛpater vipakṣā;rakṣāvatī kṣitir abhūt prathitair amātyaiḥ |
sāmrājyam asya vihitaṃ kṣitipālamaulimālārpitaṃ bhuvi payonidhimekhalāyām ||

sp.p: tad vayaṃ śāntarasaprayogābhinayenātmānaṃ vinodayitum icchāmaḥ | tad yat pūrvam asmadgurubhis, tatrabhavadbhiḥ śrīkṛṣṇamiśraiḥ prabodhacandrodayaṃ nāma nāṭakaṃ nirmāya bhavataḥ samarpitam āsīt tad adya rājñaḥ śrīkīrtivarmaṇaḥ purastād abhinetavyaṃ bhavatā | asti cāsya bhūpateḥ sapariṣadas tadavalokane kutūhalam” iti | tad bhavatu | gṛhaṃ gatvā, gṛhiṇīm āhūya, saṅgītakam anutiṣṭhāmi | parikramya, nepathyābhimukham avalokya | ārye! itas tāvat!

p.seg: esa mhi | āṇavedu, ayyaütto, ko ṇioo aṇuciṭṭhīyadu tti |eṣāsmi | ājñāpayatv āryaputraḥ ko niyogo 'nuṣṭhīyatām iti |

sp.speaker: sūtradhāraḥ
sp.p: ārye viditam eva bhavatyā —

lg.l: asti pratyarthipṛthvīpativipulabalāraṇyamūrcchatpratāpajyotirjvālāvalīḍhatribhuvanavivaro viśvaviśrāntakīrtiḥ |
gopālo bhūmipālān prasabham asilatāmitramātreṇa jitvā;sāmrājye kīrtivarmā narapatitilako yena bhūyo 'bhyaṣeci ||

lg.head: api ca —
lg.l: adyāpy unmadayātudhānataruṇīcañcatkarāsphālanavyāvalgannṛkapālatālaraṇitair nṛtyatpiśācāṅganāḥ |
udgāyanti yaśāṃsi yasya vitatair nādaiḥ pracaṇḍānilaprakṣubhyatkarikumbhakūṭakuharavyaktai raṇakṣoṇayaḥ ||

sp.p: tena ca śāntapathaprasthitenātmano vinodārthaṃ prabodhacandrodayābhidhānaṃ nāṭakam abhinetum ādiṣṭo 'smi | tad ādiśyantāṃ bharatā varṇikāparigrahāya!

p.seg: accariaṃ accariaṃ | jeṇa taha ṇiabhuabalavikkamekkaṇibbhacchiasaalarāamaṇḍaleṇa ākaṇṇākiṭṭhakaṭhiṇakoaṇḍadaṇḍabahalaghaṇavarisantasantaasaradhārāṇiarajajjarijjantaturaṃgataraṃgamālaṃ, ṇirantaraṇivaḍantatikkhakhaggavikkhattasahatthasathapaliattotuṅgamaāṅgamahāmahīharasahassaṃ, bhamantabhuadaṇḍamandalāhihādaghuṇṇantasaalapattisalilasa≤ṇghā≥«ṃghā»aṃ, kaṇṇaseṇṇasāaraṃ ṇimmahia | mahumahaṇeṇavva khīrasamuddaṃ āsādiā; samaravijaalacchī | tassa saṃpadaṃ saalamuṇiaṇasalāṇijjo kahaṃ īriso uvasamo saṃvutto |āścaryam, āścaryam! yena tathā nijabhujabalavikram'aikanirbhartsitasakalarājamaṇḍalenākarṇākṛṣṭakaṭhinakodaṇḍadaṇḍabahalaghanavarṣatsantataśaradhārānikarajarjaratturaṅgataraṅgamālaṃ nirantaranipatattīkṣṇakhadgavikṣiptasvahastaśastraparyastottuṅgamātaṅgamahāmahīdharasahasram bhramadbhujadaṇḍamandarābhighātaghūrṇamānasakalapattisalilasaṃghātaṃ karṇasainyasāgaraṃ nirmathya madhumathaneneva kṣīrasamudram āsāditā samaravijayalakṣmīḥ | tasya sāmprataṃ sakalamunijanaślāghanīyaḥ katham īdṛśa upaśamaḥ saṃvṛtaḥ |

sp.speaker: sūtradhāraḥ
sp.p: ārye nisargasaumyam eva brāhmaṃ jyotiḥ, kuto 'pi kāraṇāt prāptavikriyam api, punaḥ svabhāva evāvatiṣṭhate | yataḥ sakalabhūpālakulapralayakālāgnirudreṇa cedipatinā samunmūlitaṃ candrānvayapārthivānāṃ pṛthivyām ādhipatyaṃ sthirīkartum ayam asya saṃrambhaḥ | paśya tathā —

lg.l: kalpāntavātasaṃkṣobhalaṅghitāśeṣabhūbhṛtaḥ, |
dhairyaprasādamaryādās tā eva hi mahodadheḥ ||

sp.p: api ca, bhagavannārāyaṇāṃśasaṃbhūtā bhūtahitāya tathāvidhapauruṣabhūṣaṇāḥ puruṣāḥ kṣitim avatīrya, niṣpāditakṛtyāḥ punaḥ śāntim eva prapadyante | tathā hi paraśurāmam evākalayatu bhavatī tāvat —

lg.l: yena triḥsaptakṛtvo nṛpabahulavasāmāṃsamastiṣkapaṅkaprāgbhāre 'kāri bhūricyutarudhirasaridvāripūre 'bhiṣekaḥ |
yasya strībālavṛddhāvadhinidhanavidhau nirdayo viśruto 'saurājanyoccāṃsakūṭatruṭanapaṭuraṭadghoradhāraḥ kuṭhāraḥ ||
so 'pi svavīryād avatārya bhūmer bhāraṃ samutkhāya kulaṃ nṛpāṇām, |
praśāntakopajvalanas tapobhiḥ śrīmān punaḥ śāmyati jāmadagnyaḥ ||

sp.p: tathāyam api kṛtakartavyaḥ saṃprati parāṃ śāntiṃ prapannaḥ | yena ca —

lg.l: vivekeneva nirjitya karṇaṃ moham ivorjitam, |
śrīkīrtivarmanṛpater bodhasyevodayaḥ kṛtaḥ ||

sp.speaker: (nepathye)
sp.p: āḥ pāpa śailūṣādhama! katham, asmāsu jīvatsu, svāmino mahāmohasya vivekasakāśāt parājayam udāharasi?

sp.speaker: sūtradhāraḥ
sp.p: sasaṃbhramaṃ vilokya ārye itas tāvat |

lg.l: uttuṅgapīvarakucadvayapīḍitāṅgam,āliṅgitaḥ pulikitena bhujena ratyā, |
śrīmāñ jaganti madayan nayanābhirāmaḥ,kāmo 'yam eti madaghūrṇitanetrapadmaḥ ||

sp.p: madvacanāc cāyam upajātakrodha iva lakṣyate | tad apasaraṇam evāsmākam itaḥ śreyaḥ |
niṣkrāntau | prastāvanā |

p.stage: tataḥ praviśati yathānirdiṣṭaḥ kāmo ratiś ca |

sp.speaker: kāmaḥ
sp.p: sakrodham, āḥ pāpeti pūrvoktam eva paṭhitvā nanu re re bharatādhama!

lg.l: prabhavati manasi viveko viduṣām api śāstrasaṃbhavas tāvat, |
nipatanti dṛṣṭiviśikhā yāvan nendīvarākṣīṇām ||

lg.head: api ca —
lg.l: ramyaṃ harmyatalaṃ, navāḥ sunayanā, guñjaddvirephā latāḥ,pronmīlannavamallikā, surabhayo vātāḥ, sacandrāḥ kṣapāḥ — |
ity etāni jayanti hanta paritaḥ śastrāṇy amoghāni me,tad bhoḥ kīdṛg asau vivekavibhavaḥ, kīdṛg prabodhodayaḥ? ||

p.seg: ajjaütta! garuo kkhu mahāraamahāmohassa paḍivakkho viveo tti takkemi |āryaputra! garīyān khalu mahārājamahāmohasya pratipakṣo viveka iti tarkayāmi |

sp.speaker: kāmaḥ
sp.p: priye, kutas tavedaṃ strīsvabhāvasulabhaṃ vivekād bhayam utpannam? paśya —

lg.l: api yadi viśikhāḥ śarāsanaṃ vā kusumam ayaṃ sasurāsuraṃ tathāpi, |
mama jagad akhilaṃ, varoru! nājñām idam atilaṅghya dhṛtiṃ muhūrtam eti ||

lg.head: tathā hi —
lg.l: ahalyāyā jāraḥ surapatir abhūd, ātmatanayāṃprajānātho 'yāsīd, abhajata guror indur abalām |
iti prāyaḥ ko vā na padam apade 'kāryata mayā?śramo madbāṇānāṃ ka iva bhuvanonmāthavidhiṣu? ||

p.seg: ajjaütta evvaṃ edaṃ | taha vi mahāsahāasaṃpaṇṇo saṅgidavvo aradī | jado 'ssa jamaṇiamappamuhā amaccā mahābalā suṇiandi |āryaputra, evaṃ etat | tathāpi mahāsahāyasaṃpannaḥ śaṅkitavyo 'ratiḥ | yato 'sya yaminiyamapramukhā amātyā mahābalāḥ śrūyante |

sp.speaker: kāmaḥ
sp.p: priye, yān etān rājño vivekasya balavato yamādīn aṣṭāv amātyān paśyasi ta ete niyatam asmābhir abhiyuktamātrād drāg eva vighaṭiṣyante | tathā hi —

lg.l: ahiṃsā kaiva kopasya? brahmacaryādayo mama? |
lobhasya purataḥ ke 'mī — satyāsteyāparigrahāḥ? ||

sp.p: yamaniyamāsanaprāṇāyāmapratyāhāradhyānadhāraṇāsamādhayas tu, nirvikāracittaikasādhyatvād, īṣatkarasamunmūlanā eva | api ca striya evāmīṣāṃ kṛtyās tenaite 'smadgocarā eva na vartante | yataḥ —

lg.l: santu vilokanabhāṣaṇavilāsaparihāsakeliparirambhāḥ! |
smaraṇam api kāminīnām alam iha manaso vikārāya ||

sp.p: viśeṣataś caite madamānamātsaryadambhastambhalobhādibhir asmatsvāmivallabhair abhiyujyamānā narapatimantriṇo 'dharmam evāśrayiṣyante |

p.seg: sudaṃ mae tumhāṇaṃ samadamaviveappahudīṇaṃ ca ekkaṃ uppattitthāṇaṃ ti |śrutaṃ mayā yuṣmākaṃ śamadamavivekaprabhṛtīnāṃ caikam utpattisthānam iti |

sp.speaker: kāmaḥ
sp.p: āḥ, priye, kim ucyata “ekam utpattisthānam” iti, nanu janaka evāsmākam abhinnaḥ | tathā hi —

lg.l: saṃbhūtaḥ prathamamaheśvarasya saṅgān māyāyāṃ mana iti viśrutas tanūjaḥ |
trailokyaṃ sakalam idaṃ visṛjya bhūyas tenātho janitam idam kuladvayaṃ naḥ ||

sp.p: tasya ca pravṛttinivṛttī dve dharmapatnyau | tayoḥ pravṛttyāṃ samutpannaṃ mahāmohapradhānam ekaṃ kulam | nivṛttyāṃ ca dvitīyaṃ vivekapradhānam iti |

p.seg: ajjaütta jaï evvaṃ, tā kiṃ ṇimittaṃ tumhāṇaṃ soarāṇaṃ vi īrisaṃ veram?āryaputra, yady evaṃ, tat kinnimittaṃ yuṣmākaṃ sodarāṇām api īdṛśaṃ vairam?

sp.speaker: kāmaḥ

lg.head: priye,
lg.l: ekāmiṣaprabhavam eva mahīpatīnāmujjṛmbhate jagati vairam iti prasiddham |
pṛthvīnimittam abhavat kurupāṇḍavānāṃtīvras tathā hi bhuvanakṣayakṛdvirodhaḥ ||

sp.p: sarvam evaitaj jagad asmākaṃ pitryam upārjanaṃ, tac cāsmābhis tātavallabhatayā sarvam evākrāntam, teṣāṃ tu viralaḥ pracāraḥ | tenaite pāpāḥ sāṃprataṃ pitaram asmāṃś conmūlayitum udyatāḥ!

p.seg: sāntaṃ pāvaṃ sāntaṃ pāvaṃ | ajjaütta kiṃ edaṃ pāvaṃ viddesamatteṇa tehiṃ āraddhaṃ? ahavā uvāo vi ko vi ettha mantido?śāntaṃ pāpaṃ, śāntaṃ pāpam! āryaputra, kiṃ etat pāpaṃ vidveṣamātreṇa tair ārabdham? athavā upāyo 'pi ko 'py atra mantritaḥ?

sp.speaker: kāmaḥ
sp.p: priye, asty atra kiṃcin niguḍhaṃ bījam |

p.seg: ajjaütta tā kiṃ ṇa ugghāḍīadi?āryaputra, tat kiṃ nodghāṭyate?

sp.speaker: kāmaḥ
sp.p: priye, bhavatī strīsvabhāvād bhīrur iti, na dāruṇakarma pāpīyasām udāhriyate!

p.seg: ajjaütta kerisaṃ tam?āryaputra, kīdṛśaṃ tat?

sp.speaker: kāmaḥ
sp.p: priye, na bhetavyaṃ, na bhetavyam | hatāśānāṃ manorathamātram evaitat | asti kilaiṣā kiṃvadantī — “asmākaṃ kule kālarātrikalpā vidyā nāma rākṣasī samutpatsyata” iti |

p.seg: haddhi! kadhaṃ uṇa amhāṇaṃ kule rakkhasi? tti vevadi me hiaam |hā dhik! katham punar asmākaṃ kule rākṣasīti? vepate me hṛdayam |

sp.speaker: kāmaḥ
sp.p: priye, na bhetavyaṃ, ne bhetavyaṃ | kiṃvadantīmātram etat |

p.seg: aha tāe rakkhasīe kiṃ kādavvam?atha tayā rākṣasyā kiṃ kartavyam?

sp.speaker: kāmaḥ
sp.p: priye asti kilaiṣā prājāpatyā sarasvatī —

lg.l: puṃsaḥ saṅgasamujjhitasya gṛhiṇī māyeti tenāpy asāvaspṛṣṭāpi manaḥ prasūya tanayaṃ; lokān asūta kramāt |
tasmād eva janiṣyate punar asau vidyeti kanyā yayātātas te ca sahodarāś ca jananī sarvaṃ ca bhakṣyaṃ kulam ||

sp.speaker: ratiḥ
kāmaḥ

lg.l: sphuradromodbhedas taralataratārākuladṛśo,bhayotkampottuṅgastanayugabharāsaṅgasubhagaḥ |
adhīrākṣyā guñjanmaṇivalayadorvalliracitaḥ;parīrambho modaṃ janayati ca saṃmohayati ca ||

sp.p: prakāśam | dṛḍhaṃ pariṣvajya | priye, na bhetavyaṃ, na bhetavyam | asmāsu jīvatsu kuto vidyotpattiḥ?

p.seg: ajjaütta kiṃ tāe rakkhassīe uppattī amhāṇaṃ paḍivakkhāṇaṃ sammadā?āryaputra, kiṃ tasyā rākṣasyā utpattir asmākaṃ pratipakṣāṇāṃ sammatā?

sp.speaker: kāmaḥ
sp.p: bāḍham! sā khalu vivekenopaniṣaddevyāṃ prabodhacandreṇa bhrātrā samaṃ janayitavyā | tatra sarva evaite śamadamādayaḥ pratipannodyogāḥ |

p.seg: kahaṃ puṇa appaṇo vināsakāriṇīe vijjāe uppattī tehiṃ duvviṇīdehiṃ silāhijjaï?katham punar ātmano vināśakāriṇyā vidyāyā utpattir tair durvinītaiḥ slāghyate?

sp.speaker: kāmaḥ
sp.p: priye, kulakṣayapravṛttānāṃ pāpakāriṇāṃ kutaḥ svaparapratyavāyagaṇanā? paśya —

lg.l: sahajamalinavakrabhāvabhājāṃbhavati bhavaḥ prabhavātmanāśahetuḥ |
jaladharapadavīm avāpya dhūmojvalanavināśam anuprayāti nāśam ||

sp.speaker: (nepathye)
sp.p: āḥ pāpa! durātman! katham asmān eva “pāpakāriṇa” ity ākṣipasi | nanu re!

lg.l: guror apy avaliptasya, kāryākāryam ajānataḥ, |
utpathaṃ pratipannasya, parityāgo vidhīyate ||

sp.p: iti paurāṇikīṃ gāthāṃ purāṇavida udāharanti! anena cāsmākaṃ janakenāhaṅkārānuvartinā jagatpatiḥ pitaiva tāvad baddhaḥ! mohādibhiś ca sa eva bandhaḥ sudṛḍhatāṃ nītaḥ |

sp.speaker: kāmaḥ
sp.p:
samantād avalokya priye, ayam asmākaṃ kule jyāyān matyā devyā saha viveka ita evābhivartate | ya eṣaḥ —
nirbhartsyamāna iva mānadhanaḥ kṛśāṅgaḥ |

lg.l: rāgādibhiḥ svarasacāribhir āttakāntir
matyā nitāntakaluṣīkṛtayā śaśaṅkaḥkāntyeva sāndratuhināntarito vibhāti ||

sp.p: tan na yuktam ihāsmākam avasthātum |
iti niṣkrāntau viṣkambhaḥ

p.stage: tataḥ praviśati rājā viveko matiś ca

sp.speaker: rājā
sp.p: vicintya priye, śrutaṃ tvayāsya durvinītasya kāmabaṭor madavisphūrjitaṃ vaco yad asmān eva pāpakāriṇa ity ākṣipati?

p.seg: ajjaütta kiṃ appaṇo dosaṃ loo viāṇādi?āryaputra, kim ātmano doṣaṃ loko vijānāti?

sp.speaker: rājā

lg.head: paśya —
lg.l: asāv ahaṅkāraparair durātmabhirnibadhya taiḥ pāpaśaṭhair madādibhiḥ, |
ciraṃ cidānandamayo nirañjanojagatpatir dīnadaśām anīyata ||

sp.p: ta ete puṇyakāriṇo vayaṃ tu tanmuktaye pravṛttāḥ pāpakāriṇa! ity aho jitaṃ durātmabhiḥ!

p.seg: ajjaütta, jado so sahaāṇandasundarasahāvo ṇiccappaāsapphurantasaalattihuaṇappaāro paramessaro suṇīadi | tā kahaṃ edehiṃ duvviaḍḍhehiṃ baṃdhia mahāmohasāare ṇikkhitto?āryaputra, yato 'sau sahajānandasundarasvabhāvo nityaprakāśasphuratsakalatribhuvanapracāraḥ parameśvaraḥ śrūyate | tasmāt katham etair dirvidagdhair bandhitvā mahāmohasāgare nikṣiptaḥ |

lg.head: priye,
lg.l: satatadhṛtir apy uccaiḥ śānto 'py avāptamahodayo'py adhigatanayo 'py antaḥsvaccho 'py udīritadhīr api, |
tyajati sahajaṃ dhairyaṃ strībhiḥ pratāritamānasaḥ.svam api yad ayaṃ māyāsaṅgāt pumān iti vismṛtaḥ? ||

p.seg: ajjaütta, ṇaṃ andhakāralehāe sahassarassiṇo tirakkāro jaṃ māāe taha papphurantamahappaāsasāarassa devassa vi ahihavo |āryaputra, nanu andhakāralekhayā sahasraraśmes tiraskāro yan māyayā tathā prasphuranmahāprakāśasāgarasya devasyāpy abhibhavaḥ |

sp.speaker: rājā
sp.p: priye, avicārasiddheyaṃ veśyāvilāsinīva māyā asato 'pi bhāvānupadarśayantī puruṣaṃ vañcayati | paśya —

lg.l: sphaṭikamaṇivad bhāsvān devaḥ pragāḍham anāryayāvikṛtim anayā nītaḥ kām apy asaṅgatavikriyaḥ |
na khalu tad upaśleṣād asya vyapaiti rucir manāk,prabhavati tathāpy eṣā puṃso vidhātum adhīratām ||

p.seg: ajjaütta, kiṃ puṇa kālaṇaṃ jeṇa taha udāracaridaṃ duvviaḍhḍhā patāredi?āryaputra, kiṃ punaḥ kāraṇaṃ yena sā tathodāracaritaṃ durvidagdhā pratārayati?

sp.speaker: rājā
sp.p: na khalu prayojanaṃ kāraṇaṃ vā vilokya māyā pravartate | svabhāvaḥ khalv asau strīpiśācīnāṃ | paśya —

lg.l: saṃmohayanti, madayanti, viḍambayanti;nirbhartsayanti, ramayanti, viṣādayanti |
etāḥ praviśya sadayaṃ hṛdayaṃ narāṇāṃ,kiṃ nāma vāmanayanā na samācaranti? ||

sp.p: asti cāparam api kāraṇam |

p.seg: ajjaütta, kiṃ ṇāma taṃ kālaṇam?āryaputra, kiṃ nāma tat kāraṇam |

sp.speaker: rājā
sp.p: evam anayā durācārayā vicintitaṃ yad “ahaṃ tāvad gatayauvanā varṣīyasījātā | ayaṃ ca purāṇapuruṣaḥ svabhāvād eva viṣayarasavimukhaḥ | tataḥ svatanayam eva pārameśvarapade niveśayāmī”ti tam eva mātur abhiprāyam āsādya nitāntatatpratyāsannatayā tadrūpatām ivāpannena manasā navadvārāṇi purāṇi racayitvā |

lg.l: eko 'pi bahudhā teṣu vicchidyeva niveśitaḥ |
svaceṣṭitam atho tasmin nidadhāti maṇāv iva ||

p.seg: jārisī mādā putto vi tāriso jevva jādo |yādṛśī mātā putro 'pi tāḍṛśa eva jātaḥ |

sp.speaker: rājā
sp.p: tato 'sāv ahaṃkāreṇa cittasya jyeṣṭhaputreṇa naptrā pariṣvaktaḥ | tataś cāsāv īśvaraḥ —

lg.l: “jāto 'haṃ janako mamaiṣa jananī kṣetraṃ kalatraṃ kulaṃputrā mitram arātayo vasu balaṃ vidyāḥ suhṛd bāndhavāḥ” |
cittaspanditakalpanām anubhavan vidvān avidyāmayīṃnidrām etya vighūrṇito bahuvidhān svapnān imān paśyati ||

p.seg: ajjaütta evvaṃ dīhadīhataraṇiddāviddāviappabohe paramessare kahaṃ pabohuppattī bhavissadi?āryaputra, evaṃ dīrghadīrghataranidrāvidrāvitaprabodhe parameśvare kathaṃ prabodhotpattir bhaviṣyati |
kitti guruaralajjābharaṇamidaseharo tūṇhīṃbhūdo 'si?kimiti gurutaralajjābharanamitaśekharas tūṣṇīṃbhūto 'si |

sp.speaker: rājā
sp.p: priye, serṣyaṃ prāyeṇa yoṣitāṃ bhavati hṛdayam | tena sāparāḍham ivātmānaṃ śaṅke |

p.seg: aṇṇāo tāo itthiāo, jāo sarasappaüttassa vā dhammapahavāvārappavuttassa vā bhattuṇo hiaadiaṃ vihaṇandi |anyās tāḥ striyo, yāḥ svarasapravṛttasya vā dharmapathavyāpārapravṛttasya vā bhartur hṛdayepsitaṃ vighnanti |

lg.head: priye —
lg.l: māninyāś ciraviprayogajanitāsūyākulāyā bhavecchāntyāder anukūlanād upaniṣaddevyā mayā saṃgamaḥ, |
tūṣṇīṃ ced viṣayānapāsya bhavatī tiṣṭhen muhūrtaṃ tatojāgratsvapnasuṣuptidhāmavirahāt prāptaḥ prabodhodayaḥ ||

p.seg: ajjaütta, jadi evaṃ kulappahuṇo diḍhagaṃthiṇiṭṭhāvia bandhamokkho bhodi tado tāe ṇiccāṇubaddho jevva ajjaütto bhodu! suṭṭhu me piam |āryaputra, yady evaṃ kulaprabhor dṛḍhagranthiniṣṭhāpita bandhamokṣo bhavati tatas tayā nityānubaddha evāryaputro bhavatu | suṣṭhu me priyam |

sp.speaker: rājā
sp.p: yady evaṃ prasannāsi siddhās tarhy asmākaṃ manorathāḥ | tathā hi —

lg.l: baddhvaiko bahudhā vibhajya jagatām ādiḥ prabhuḥ śāśvataḥkṣiptvā yaiḥ puruṣaḥ pureṣu paramo mṛtyoḥ padaṃ prāpitaḥ |
teṣāṃ brahmabhidāṃ vidhāya vidhivat prāṇāntikaṃ vidyayāprāyaścittam idaṃ mayā punar asau brahmaikatāṃ nīyate ||

sp.p: tad bhavatu | prastutavidhānāya śamādīn udyojayāmaḥ |

milestone.n: iti śrīkṛṣṇamiśrayatiracite prabodhacandrodaye māyāvilasitaṃ nāma prathamo 'ṅkaḥ |

sp.speaker: dambhaḥ
sp.p: ādiṣṭo 'smi mahārājamahāmohena yathā — “vatsa dambha pratijñātaṃ sāmātyena vivekena prabodhodayāya, preṣitāś ca teṣu teṣu tīrtheṣu śamadamādayaḥ | sa cāyam asmākam upasthitaḥ kulakṣayo, bhavadbhir avahitaiḥ pratikartavyaḥ | tatra pṛthivyāṃ paramaṃ muktikṣetraṃ vārāṇasī nāma nagarī | tad bhavāṃs tatra gatvā caturṇām apy āśramāṇāṃ niḥśreyasavighnāya prayatatāṃ” iti | tad idānīṃ vaśīkṛtabhūyiṣṭhā mayā vārāṇasī saṃpāditaś ca svāmino yathānirdiṣṭa ādeśaḥ | tathā hi madadhiṣṭhitair idānīm —

lg.l: veśyāveśmasu sīdhugandhilalanāvaktrāsavāmoditairnītvā nirbharamanmathotsavarasair unnidracandrāḥ kṣapāḥ, |
sarvajñā iti dīkṣitā iti cirāt prāptāgnihotrā itibrahmajñā iti tāpasā iti divā dhūrtair jagad vañcyate ||

sp.p: vilokya ko 'py ayaṃ pāntho bhāgīrathīm uttīrya sāṃpratam ita evābhivartate? yathā cāyaṃ —

lg.l: jvalann ivābhimānena, grasann iva jagattrayīm, |
bhartsayann iva vāgjālaiḥ, prajñayopahasann iva ||

sp.p: tathā tarkayāmi | nūnam ayaṃ dakṣiṇarāḍhāpradeśād āgataḥ | tad asmād āryasyāhaṃkārasya vṛttāntam avagacchāmi | iti parikrāmati |

sp.speaker: ahaṅkāraḥ
sp.p: aho! mūrkhabahulaṃ jagat! tathā hi —

lg.l: naivāśrāvi guror mataṃ, na viditaṃ kaumārilaṃ darśanaṃ,tattvajñānam aho na śālikagirāṃ vācaspateḥ kā kathā? |
sūktaṃ nāpi mahodadher adhigataṃ, māhāvratī nekṣitā,sūkṣmā vastuvicāraṇā, nṛpaśubhiḥ svasthaiḥ kathaṃ sthīyate ||

sp.p: vilokya ete tāvad arthāvadhāraṇavidhurāḥ; svādhyāyādhyayanamātraniratā vedaviplāvakā eva | punar anyato gatvā | ete ca bhikṣāmātraṃ gṛhītayativratā, muṇḍitamuṇḍāḥ paṇḍitammanyā vedāntaśāstraṃ vyākulayanti | vihasya

lg.l: pratyakṣādipramāsiddhaviruddhārthābhidhāyinaḥ, |
vedāntā yadi śāstrāṇi bauddhaiḥ kim aparādhyate? ||

sp.p: tad etad vāṅmātraśravaṇam api gurutaraduritodayāya! punar anyato gatvā | ete ca śaivapāśupatādayo durabhyastākṣapādamatāḥ paśavaḥ pāṣaṇḍāḥ! amīṣāṃ saṃbhāṣaṇād api narā narakaṃ yānti | tad ete darśanapathād dūrataḥ pariharaṇīyāḥ | punar anyato gatvā | ete ca —

lg.l: gaṅgātīrataraṅgaśītalaśilāvinyastabhāsvadbṛsīsaṃviṣṭāḥ, kuśamuṣṭimaṇḍitamahādaṇḍāḥ karaṇḍojjvalāḥ, |
paryāyagrathitākṣasūtravalayapratyekabījagrahavyagrāgrāṅgulayo haranti dhanināṃ vittāny, aho dāmbhikāḥ! ||

sp.p: anyato gatvā vilokya | ete tridaṇḍavyapadeśajīvino dvaitādvaitamārgaparibhraṣṭā eva! aye! kasyaitad dvāropāntanikhātātiprāṃśuvaṃśakāṇḍatāṇḍavitadhautasitasūkṣmāmbarasahasram, itas tato vinyastakṛṣṇājinadṛṣadupalasamiccaṣālolūkhalamusalam, anavaratahutājyagandhīdhūmaśyāmalitagaganamaṇḍalam amarasarito nātidūre vibhāty āśramamaṇḍalam? nūnam idaṃ kasyāpi gṛhamedhino gṛhaṃ bhaviṣyati | bhavatu, yuktam asmākam atipavitram etad dvitridivasanivāsasthānam | praveśaṃ nāṭayati vilokya ca | aye!

lg.l: mṛdbindulāñchitalalāṭabhujodaroraḥkāṇṭhoṣṭhapṛṣṭhacibukorukapolajānuḥ; |
cūḍāgrakarṇakaṭipāṇivirājamānadarbhāṅkuraḥ — sphurati! mūrta ivaiṣa dambhaḥ ||

sp.p: bhavatūpasarpāmy enam | upasṛtya | kalyāṇam bhavatu, bhavatām!

sp.speaker: baṭuḥ
sp.p: sasaṃbhramam | brahman, dūrata eva sthīyatām! yataḥ pādau prakṣālya etad āśramapadaṃ praveṣṭavyam!

sp.speaker: ahaṅkāraḥ
sp.p: sakrodham āḥ pāpa! turuṣkadeśaṃ prāptāḥ smaḥ, yatra śrotriyān atithīn āsanapādyādibhir api gṛhiṇo nopatiṣṭhanti!

sp.speaker: baṭuḥ
sp.p: evam ārādhyapādā ājñāpayanti dūradeśād āgatasyāryasya kulaśīlādikaṃ na samyag asmābhir viditam |

sp.speaker: ahaṅkāraḥ
sp.p: āḥ! katham asmākam api kulaśīlādikam idānīṃ parīkṣitavyam? śrūyatām!

lg.l: gauḍaṃ rāṣṭram anuttamaṃ, ni rū ru pamā tatrāpi rāḍhāpurī,bhūriśreṣṭhikanāma dhāma paramaṃ tatrottamo naḥ pitā |
tatputrāś ca mahākulā na viditāḥ kasyātra teṣām api,prajñāśīlavivekadhairyavinayācārair ahaṃ cottamaḥ ||

sp.speaker: baṭuḥ
sp.p: tāmraghaṭīṃ gṛhītvā | brahman! pādaśaucaṃ vidhīyatām!

sp.speaker: ahaṅkāraḥ
sp.p: bhavatu | ko 'tra virodhaḥ? evaṃ kriyate | tathā kṛtvopasarpati

sp.speaker: baṭuḥ
sp.p: dūre tāvat sthīyatām! vātāhatāḥ prasvedakaṇikāḥ prasaranti!

sp.speaker: ahaṅkāraḥ
sp.p: aho! apūrvaṃ idaṃ brāhmaṇyam!

sp.speaker: baṭuḥ
sp.p: brahman evam etat! tathā hi —

lg.l: aspṛṣṭacaraṇā hy asya cūḍāmaṇimarīcibhiḥ, |
nīrājayanti bhūpālāḥ pādapīṭhāntabhūtalam ||

sp.speaker: ahaṅkāraḥ
sp.p: svagatam | aye! dambhagrāhyo 'yaṃ deśaḥ! prakāśam bhavatu | asminn āsane upaviśāmi! tathā kartum icchati |

sp.speaker: baṭuḥ
sp.p: maivam! nārādhyapādānām anyair āsanam ākramyate!

sp.speaker: ahaṅkāraḥ
sp.p: āḥ pāpa! asmābhir api dakṣiṇarāḍhāpradeśaprasiddhaviśuddhibhir nākramaṇīyam idam āsanam! śṛṇu re mūrkha —

lg.l: nāsmākaṃ jananī tathojjvalakulā, sacchrotriyāṇāṃ punarvyūḍhā kācana kanyakā khalu mayā tenāsmi tātādhikaḥ |
asmatsyālakabhāgineyadayitā mithyābhiśastā, yatastatsaṃparkavaśān mayā svagṛhiṇī preyasy api projjhitā ||

sp.speaker: dambhaḥ
sp.p: brahman, yady apy evaṃ, tathāpy aviditāsmadvṛttānto bhavān | tathā hi —

lg.l: sadanam upagato 'haṃ pūrvam ambhojayoneḥ,sapadi munibhir uccair āsaneṣūjjhiteṣu, |
saśapatham anunīya brahmaṇā gomayāmbhaḥparimṛjitanijorāv āśu saṃveśito 'smi ||

sp.speaker: ahaṅkāraḥ
sp.p: svagatam aho! dāmbhikasya brā ḥma hma ṇasyātyuktiḥ! vicintya athavā ... dambhasyaiva! bhavatv evaṃ tāvat! prakāśam āḥ, kim evaṃ garvāyase? sakrodham

lg.l: are! ka iva vāsavaḥ? kathaya ko nu padmodbhavo?vada prabhavabhūmayo jagati kā ṛṣīṇām api? |
avehi tapaso balaṃ mama purandarāṇāṃ śataṃśataṃ ca parameṣṭhināṃ patatu vā munīnāṃ śatam ||

sp.speaker: dambhaḥ
sp.p: vilokya sānandam | aye! āryaḥ pitāmaho 'asmākam ahaṅkāraḥ! ārya! dambho lobhātmajo 'haṃ bho abhivādaye!

sp.speaker: ahaṅkāraḥ
sp.p: vatsa, āyuṣmān bhava! bālaḥ khalv asi mayā dvāparānte dṛṣṭaḥ! saṃprati cirakālaviprakarṣād vārdhakyagrastatayā ca na samyak pratyabhijānāmi! api tvatkumārasyānṛtasya kuśalam?

sp.speaker: dambhaḥ
sp.p: atha kim? so 'py atraiva, mahāmohasyājñayā vartate | na hi tena vinā mūhurtam apy ahaṃ prabhavāmi |

sp.speaker: ahaṅkāraḥ
sp.p: atha tava mātāpitarau tṛṣṇālobhāv api kuśalau?

sp.speaker: dambhaḥ
sp.p: tāv api rājño mahāmohasyājñayātraiva vartete | tayor vinā, kṣaṇam api na tiṣṭhāmi | āryamiśraiḥ punaḥ kena prayojanenātra prasādaḥ kṛtaḥ?

sp.speaker: ahaṅkāraḥ
sp.p: vatsa, mayā mahāmohasya vivekasakāśād atyāhitaṃ śrutam | tena tad vṛttāntaṃ pratyetum āgato 'smi |

sp.speaker: dambhaḥ
sp.p: tarhi svāgatam evāryasya | yato mahārājasyāpīndralokād atrāgamanaṃ śrūyate | asti ca kiṃvadantī yad devena vārāṇasī rājadhānī vastuṃ nirūpiteti |

sp.speaker: ahaṅkāraḥ
sp.p: kiṃ punar vārāṇasyāṃ sarvātmanā mohasyāvasthānakāraṇam iti?

sp.speaker: dambhaḥ
sp.p: ārya, nanu vivekoparodha eva | tathā hi —

lg.l: vidyāprabodhodayajanmabhūmir, vārāṇasī brahmapurī duratyayā |
asau kulocchedavidhiṃ cikitsur, nirvastum atrecchati nityam eva ||

sp.speaker: ahaṅkāraḥ
sp.p: sabhayam yady evam, aśakyapratīkāra evāyam arthaḥ | yataḥ —

lg.l: paramam aviduṣāṃ padaṃ narāṇāṃpuravijayī karuṇāvidheyacetāḥ |
kathayati bhagavān ihāntakāle,bhavabhayakātaratārakaṃ prabodham ||

sp.speaker: dambhaḥ
sp.p: satyam etat, tathāpi naitat kāmakrodhābhibhūtānāṃ sambhāvyate! tathā hy udāharanti tairthikāḥ —

lg.l: “yasya hastau ca pādau ca manaś caiva susaṃyatam, |
vidyā tapaś ca kīrtiś ca sa tīrthaphalam aśnute ||” iti ||

sp.speaker: (nepathye)
sp.p: bho bhoḥ! paurāḥ! eṣa khalu saṃprāpto devo mahāmohaḥ! tena —

lg.l: niṣyandaiś candanānāṃ sphaṭikamaṇiśilāvedikāḥ saṃskriyantāṃ,mucyantāṃ yantramārgāḥ pracaratu parito vāridhārā gṛheṣu! |
ucchrīyantāṃ samantāt sphuradurumaṇayaḥ śreṇayas toraṇānāṃ,dhūyantāṃ saudhamūrdhasv amarapatidhanurdhāmacitrāḥ patākāḥ ||

sp.speaker: dambhaḥ
sp.p: ārya! pratyāsanno 'yaṃ mahārājaḥ! tat pratyudgamanena saṃbhāvyatām āryeṇa |

sp.speaker: ahaṅkāraḥ
sp.p: evaṃ bhavatu |
niṣkrāntau | viṣkambhakaḥ |

p.stage: tataḥ praviśati mahāmoho vibhavataś ca parivāraḥ |

sp.speaker: mahāmohaḥ
sp.p: vihasya aho! niraṅkuśā jaḍadhiyaḥ!

lg.l: “ātmāsti dehād vyatiriktamūrtir bhoktā sa lokāntaritaḥ phalānām.” — |
āśeyam ākāśataroḥ prasūnāt prathīyasaḥ svāduphalaprasūtau ||

sp.p: idaṃ ca svakalpanāvinirmitapadārthāvaṣṭambhena jagad eva durvidagdhair vañcyate | tathā hi —

lg.l: “yan nāsty eva tad asti vastv” iti mṛṣā jalpadbhir evāstikairvācālair bahubhis tu satyavacaso nindyāḥ kṛtā nāstikāḥ |
haṃ ho! paśyata! tattvato yadi punaś chinnād ito varṣmaṇodṛṣṭaḥ kiṃ pariṇāmarūṣitaciter jīvaḥ pṛthak kair api? ||

sp.p: api ca, na kevalaṃ jagad, ātmaiva tāvad amībhir vañcyate! tathā hi —

lg.l: tulyatve vapuṣāṃ mukhādyavayavair varṇakramaḥ kīdṛśo?yoṣeyaṃ vasu vā parasya tad amuṃ bhedaṃ na vidmo vayam |
hiṃsāyām athavā yatheṣṭagamane, strīṇāṃ parasvagrahe,kāryākāryakathāṃ tathāpi yad amī niṣpauruṣāḥ kurvate ||

sp.p: vicintya, saślāgham | sarvathā lokāyatam eva śāstraṃ yatra pratyakśam eva pramāṇaṃ; pṛthivyaptejovāyavas tattvāni; arthakāmau puruṣārthau; bhūtany eva cetayante | nāsti paralokaḥ, mṛtyur evāpavargaḥ | tad etad asmadabhiprāyānubandhinā vācaspatinā praṇīya cārvākāya samarpitam | tena ca śiṣyopaśiṣyadvāreṇāsmiṃl loke bahulīkṛtaṃ tantram |

sp.speaker: cārvākaḥ
sp.p: vatsa, jānāsi daṇḍanītir eva vidyā! atraiva vārtāntarbhavati | dhūrtapralāpas trayī! svargotpādakatvena viśeṣābhāvāt | paśya —

lg.l: svargaḥ kartṛkriyādravyavināśe yadi yajvanām, |
tato dāvāgnidagdhānāṃ phalaṃ syad bhūri bhūruhām ||

lg.head: api ca —
lg.l: nihatasya paśor yajñe svargaprāptir yadīṣyate, |
svapitā yajamānena tatra kasmān na hanyate? ||

lg.head: api ca —
lg.l: mṛtānām api jantūnāṃ śrāddhaṃ cet tṛptikāraṇam, |
nirvāṇasya pradīpasya snehaḥ saṃvardhayec chikhāṃ? ||

p.seg: ācālia, jaī eso evva puluattho jaṃ khajjae pijjaae, tā kitti edehiṃ titthiehiṃ saṃsālasokkhaṃ palihalia appā gholagholehiṃ palāasāṃtavaṇasaṭṭhakālāsaṇappahudihiṃ dukkhehiṃ khavijjadiācārya, yady eṣa eva puruṣārtho yat khādyate pīyate ca, tat kimity etais tairthikaiḥ saṃsārasaukhyaṃ parihṛtyātmā ghoraghoraiḥ parākasāntapanaṣaṣṭhakālāśanaprabhṛtibhir duḥkhaiḥ kṣapyate |

sp.speaker: cārvākaḥ
sp.p: dhūrtapraṇītāgamapratāritānām mūrkhāṇām āśāmodakair eveyaṃ tṛptir! paśya paśya —

lg.l: kvāliṅganaṃ bhujanipīḍitabāhumūlabhagnonnatastanamanoharam āyatākṣyāḥ, |
bhikṣopavāsaniyamārkamarīcidāhairdehopaśoṣaṇavidhiḥ kudhiyāṃ kva caiṣaḥ? ||

p.seg: ācālia, evaṃ khu titthia ālavanti dukkhamissidaṃ saṃsālasokkhaṃ palihalaṇijjaṃ tti |ācārya, evaṃ khalu tairthikā ālapanti duḥkhamiśritaṃ saṃsārasaukhyaṃ pariharaṇīyam iti |

sp.speaker: cārvākaḥ
sp.p: vihasya āḥ! durbuddhivilasitam idaṃ narapaśūnām!

lg.l: “tyājyaṃ sukhaṃ viṣayasaṃgamajanma puṃsāṃduḥkhopasṛṣṭam” — iti mūrkhavicāraṇaiṣā |
vrīhīn jihāsati sitottamataṇḍulāḍhyānko nāma bhos tuṣakaṇopahitān hitārthī? ||

sp.speaker: mahāmohaḥ
sp.p: aye, cireṇa khalu pramāṇavanti vacanāni karṇasukham upajanayanti! vilokya sānandam | hanta! priyasuhṛn me, cārvākaḥ!

sp.speaker: cārvākaḥ
sp.p: vilokya eṣa mahārājamahāmohaḥ! upasarpāmi | upasṛtya jayatu jayatu mahārājaḥ! eṣa cārvākaḥ praṇamati |

sp.speaker: mahāmohaḥ
sp.p: cārvāka, svāgataṃ te! ihopaviśyatām |

sp.speaker: cārvākaḥ
sp.p: upaviśya deva! kaler asāv aṣṭāṅgapātaḥ praṇāmaḥ |

sp.speaker: mahāmohaḥ
sp.p: atha kaler bhadram avyāhatam |

sp.speaker: cārvākaḥ
sp.p: devaprasādena kaler bhadram! nirvartitakartavyaśeṣaś ca devapādamūlaṃ draṣṭum icchati | yataḥ —

lg.l: ājñām avāpya mahatīṃ dviṣatāṃ nikhātānnirvartya tāṃ sapadi labdhasukhaprasādaḥ |
uccaiḥ pramodam anumoditadarśanaḥ sandhanyo namasyati padāmburuhaṃ prabhūṇām ||

sp.speaker: mahāmohaḥ
sp.p: atha tatra kiyat saṃpannam?

sp.speaker: cārvākaḥ
sp.p: deva —

lg.l: vyatītavedārthapathaḥ prathīyasīṃ,yatheṣṭhaceṣṭhāṃ gamito mahājanaḥ |
tad atra hetur na kalir na cāpy ahaṃ,prabhuprasādo hi tanoti pauruṣam ||

sp.p: tatrottarāḥ pathikāḥ pāścātyāś ca trayīm eva tyājitāḥ | śamadamādīnāṃ kaiva kathā? anyatrāpi prāyaśo jīvikāmātraphalaiva trayī | yathāhācāryaḥ —

lg.l: agnihotraṃ trayo vedās tridaṇḍaṃ bhasmaguṇṭhanam — |
buddhipauruṣahīnānāṃ jīviketi bṛhaspatiḥ ||

sp.p: tena kurukṣetrādiṣu tīrtheṣu tāvad devena svapne'pi vidyāprabodhodayo nāśaṅkanīyaḥ |

sp.speaker: mahāmohaḥ
sp.p: sādhu! saṃpāditam! mahat khalu tat tīrthaṃ vyarthīkṛtam |

sp.speaker: cārvākaḥ
sp.p: deva, anyac ca vijñāpyam asti |

sp.speaker: mahāmohaḥ
sp.p: kiṃ tat?

sp.speaker: cārvākaḥ
sp.p: asti viṣṇubhaktir nāma mahāprabhāvā yoginī | sā tu kalinā yady api viralapracārā kṛtā, tathāpi tadanugṛhītān vayam ālokayitum api na prabhavāmaḥ | tad atra devenāvadhātavyam iti |

sp.speaker: mahāmohaḥ
sp.p: sabhayam ātmagatam | āḥ! prasiddhamahāprabhāvā sā yoginī, svabhāvād vidveṣiṇī cāsmākaṃ | durucchedā sā | prakāśam | bhadra, alam anayā śaṅkayā | kāmakrodhādiṣu pratipakṣeṣu kutreyam udeṣyati? tathāpi laghīyasy api ripau nānavahitena jigīṣuṇā bhavitavyam | yataḥ —

lg.l: vipākadāruṇo rājñāṃ ripur alpo 'py aruṃtudaḥ, |
udvejayati sūkṣmo 'pi caraṇaṃ kaṇṭakāṅkuraḥ ||

sp.p: nepathyābhumukham avalokya ko 'tra bhoḥ?

sp.speaker: dauvārikaḥ
sp.p: jayatu, jayatu! ājñāpayatu devaḥ!

sp.speaker: mahāmohaḥ
sp.p: bho! asatsaṅga! ādiśyatāṃ kāmakrodhalobhamadamātsaryādayo yathā — “yoginī viṣṇubhaktir bhavadbhir evāvahitair vihantavye”ti |

sp.speaker: dauvārikaḥ
sp.p: yad ājñāpayati devaḥ | iti niṣkrāntaḥ |

sp.speaker: puruṣaḥ
sp.p: ahake ukkaladesādo āado mhi | tattha sāalatīlasaṇṇivese pulisottamasaggidaṃ devadāadaṇam | tassiṃ madamāṇehiṃ bhaṭṭakehiṃ mahālāasaāsaṃ pesido mhi | vilokya esā vālāṇasī | edaṃ lāaulam | jāva ppavisāmi | praviśya eso bhaṭṭako, cavvākeṇa satthaṃ kiṃvi mantaanto ciṭṭhadi | bhodu uvasappāmi ṇam | upsṛtya jedu, jedu, bhaṭṭako! edaṃ pattaṃ ṇilūpañjadu bhaṭṭako |aham utkaladeśād āgato 'smi | tatra sāgaratīrasanniveśe puruṣottamaśabditaṃ devatāyatanam | tasmin madamānābhyāṃ bhaṭṭārakābhyāṃ mahārājasakāśaṃ preṣito 'smi | eṣā vārāṇasī | etad rājakulam | yāvat praviśāmi | eṣa bhaṭṭārakaś cārvākeṇa sārdhaṃ kimapi mantrayaṃs tiṣṭhati | bhavatūpasarpāmy enam | jayatu jayatu bhaṭṭāṛakaḥ | idaṃ patraṃ nirūpayata bhaṭṭārakaḥ | )

sp.speaker: mahāmohaḥ
sp.p: patraṃ gṛhītvā kuto bhavān?

p.seg: bhaṭṭaka! pulisottamādo |bhaṭṭāraka! puruṣottamād |

sp.speaker: mahāmohaḥ
sp.p: svāgatam kāryam atyāhitaṃ bhaviṣyati | prakāśam cārvāka! gaccha! kartavyeṣv avahitena bhavatā bhavitavyam |

sp.speaker: cārvākaḥ
sp.p: yad ājñāpayati devaḥ | iti niṣkrāntaḥ

sp.speaker: mahāmohaḥ
sp.p: patraṃ vācayati “svasti! śrīvārāṇasyāṃ mahārājādhirājaparameśvaramahāmohapādān puruṣottamāyatanād madamānau sāṣṭāṅgapātaṃ praṇamya vijñāpayataḥ | yathā bhadram avyāhatam! anyac ca, devī śāntir mātrā śraddhayā saha, vivekasya dautyam āpannā, vivekasaṃgamāya devīm upaniṣadam ahar niśaṃ pratibodhayati | api ca kāmasahacaro 'pi, dharmo vairāgyādibhir upajapta iva lakṣyate | yataḥ, kāmād vibhidya kutaścin nigūḍhaḥ pracarati | tad etaj jñātvā, tatra devaḥ pramāṇam” iti |

sp.speaker: mahāmohaḥ
sp.p: sakrodham āḥ! kim evam atimugdhau śānter api bibhītaḥ? kāmādiṣu pratipakṣeṣu kuto 'syāḥ saṃbhavaḥ? tathā hi —

lg.l: dhātā viśvavisṛṣṭimātranirato; devo 'pi gaurībhujaśleṣānandavighūrṇamānanayano dakṣādhvaradhvaṃsanaḥ; |
daityāriḥ kamalākapolamakarīlekhāṅkitoraḥsthalaḥśete 'bdhāv. itareṣu ja nte ntu ṣu punaḥ kā nāma śānteḥ kathā? ||

sp.p: puruṣaṃ prati vadati jālma, gaccha! kāmaṃ satvaram upetyādeśam asmākaṃ pratipādaya yathā — “durāśayo dharma ity asmābhir avagatam | tad asmin muhūrtam api na viśvasitavyam | dṛḍhaṃ baddhvā dhārayitavya” iti |

sp.speaker: puruṣaḥ
sp.p: jaṃ devo āṇavedi |yad deva ājñāpayati | )

sp.speaker: mahāmohaḥ
sp.p: svagataṃ vicintya śānteḥ ko 'bhyupāyaḥ? athavā alam upāyāntareṇa! krodhalobhāv eva tāvad atra paryāptau | prakāśam kaḥ ko 'tra bhoḥ?

sp.speaker: dauvārikaḥ
sp.p: ājñāpayatu devaḥ |

sp.speaker: mahāmohaḥ
sp.p: tāvad āhūyatāṃ krodho lobhāś ca |

sp.speaker: dauvārikaḥ
sp.p: yad ājñāpayati devaḥ | iti niṣkrāntaḥ

sp.speaker: krodhaḥ
sp.p: śrutaṃ mayā śāntiśraddhāviṣṇubhaktayo mahārājasya pratipakṣam ācarantīti | aho! mayi jīvati katham āsām ātmanirapekṣitaṃ ceṣṭitam? tathā hi —

lg.l: andhīkaromi bhuvanaṃ, badhirīkaromi.dhīraṃ sacetanam, acetanatāṃ nayāmi |
kṛtyaṃ na paśyati, na yena hitaṃ śṛṇoti,dhīmān adhītam api na pratisaṃdadhāti ||

sp.speaker: lobhaḥ
sp.p: are! madupagṛhītā manorathasaritparamparām api tāvan na tariṣyanti kiṃ punaḥ śāntyādīṃś cintayiṣyanti? paśya —

lg.l: santy ete mama dantino madajalapramlānagaṇḍasthalā.vātavyāyatapātinaś ca turagā — bhūyo 'pi lapsye 'parān! |
etal labdham, idaṃ labhe; punar idaṃ labdhvādhikaṃ dhyāyatāṃcintājarjaracetasāṃ bata nṛṇāṃ, kā nāma śānteḥ kathā? ||

sp.speaker: krodhaḥ
sp.p: sakhe, viditas tvayā matprabhāvaḥ —

lg.l: tvāṣṭraṃ vṛtram aghātayat surapatiś, candrārdhacūḍo 'cchinaddevo brahmaśiro, vasiṣṭhatanayān āghātayat kauśikaḥ |
vidyāvanty api, kīrtimanty api, sadācārāvadātāny api,proccaiḥ pauruṣabhūṣaṇāny api, kulāny uddhartum īśaḥ kṣaṇāt ||

sp.speaker: lobhaḥ
sp.p: tṛṣṇe, itas tāvat!

p.seg: kiṃ ajjaütto āṇavedu?āryaputra ājñāpayatu |

lg.head: priye, śrūyatām —
lg.l: kṣetragrāmavanādripattanapuradvīpakṣamāmaṇḍalapratyāśāyatasūtrabaddhamanasāṃ labdhādhikaṃ dhyāyatāṃ, |
tṛṣṇe devi, yadi prasīdasi, tanoṣy aṅgāni tuṅgāni cet,tad bhoḥ prāṇabhṛtāṃ kutaḥ śamakathā brahmāṇḍalakṣair api? ||

p.seg: ajjaütta, saaṃ jevva dāva ahaṃ edassiṃ atthe ṇiccaṃ ahijutta | saṃpadaṃ ajjaüttassa aṇṇāe bahmaṇḍakoḍīhiṃ pi ṇa me udaraṃ pūraïssaṃdi!āryaputra, svayam eva tāvad aham etasminn arthe nityam abhiyuktā | sāṃpratam āryaputrasyājñayā brahmaṇḍakoṭibhir api na me udaraṃ pūrayiṣyate |

sp.speaker: krodhaḥ
sp.p: hiṃse, itas tāvat!

p.seg: esa mhi! āṇavedu ajjaütto!eṣāsmi! ājñāpayatv āryaputraḥ!

sp.speaker: krodhaḥ
sp.p: priye, sahadharmacāriṇyā tvayā, mātṛpitṛvadho 'pi mameṣatkara eva! tathā hi —

lg.l: keyaṃ mātā? piśācī! ka iva hi janako? bhrātaraḥ ke 'tra? kīṭā! |
vandhyo 'yaṃ bandhuvargaḥ kuṭilaviṭasuhṛcceṣṭitā jñātayo 'mī ||
āgarbhaṃ yāvad eṣāṃ kulam idam akhilaṃ naiva niḥśeṣayāmi |
sphurjantaḥ krodhavahner na dadhati viratiṃ tāvad aṅge sphuliṅgāḥ ||

sp.p: vilokya eṣa svāmī! tad upasarpāmaḥ!

sp.speaker: sarve
sp.p: upasṛtya jayatu, jayatu, devaḥ!

sp.speaker: mahāmohaḥ
sp.p: śraddhāyās tanayā śāntir asmaddveṣiṇī | sā bhavadbhir avahitair nigrāhyā |

sp.speaker: sarve
sp.p: yad ādiśati devaḥ | iti niṣkrāntāḥ

sp.speaker: mahāmohaḥ
sp.p: “śraddhāyās tanayā” — ity upakṣepeṇopāyāntaram api hṛdayam ārūḍham | tathā hi, śānter mātā śraddhā, sā ca paratantrā | tat kenāpy upāyenopaniṣatsakāśāt tāvac chraddhāpakarṣaṇaṃ kartavyam | tato mātṛviyogaduḥkhād atimṛdulatarā śāntir uparatā bhaviṣyati, avasīdantī vā viraṃsyati | śraddhāṃ cākraṣṭuṃ mithyādṛṣṭir eva vilāsinī pragalbheti tasmin viṣaye saiva niyojyā | pārśvato vilokya | vibhramāvati! satvaram āhūyatāṃ mithyādṛṣṭivilāsinī!

sp.speaker: vibhramāvatī
sp.p: jaṃ devo āṇavedi |yad deva ājñāpayati | )

p.seg: sahi, ciradiṭṭhassa mahārāassa kahaṃ muhaṃ pekkhissaṃ? ṇaṃ mahārāo maṃ uvālambhissadi |sakhi, ciradṛṣṭasya mahārājasya kathaṃ mukhaṃ prekṣiṣye? nanu mahārājo māṃ upālambhiṣyate |
sahi, tuha daṃsaṇe appāṇaṃ pi mahārāo ṇa cedaïssadi, tado kahaṃ uvālambhissadi?sakhi, tvaddarśane ātmānam api mahārājo na cetayiṣyati, tataḥ kathaṃ upālambhiṣyate?
kīsa maṃ alīasohaggāṃ saṃbhāvia viḍambesi?kasmān mām alīkasaubhāgyāṃ saṃbhāvya viḍambayasi?

sahi, saṃpadaṃ jevva pekkhissaṃ aliattaṇaṃ sohaggassa | aṇṇaṃ ca ghuṇṇantaṇiddāulaṃ via ppiasahīe loaṇaṃ pekkhāmi | tā kiṃ khu ppiasahīe viṇiddadāe kālaṇam?sakhi, sāṃpratam eva prekṣiṣye 'līkatvaṃ saubhāgyasya | anyac ca ghūrṇamānanidrākulaṃ iva priyasakhyā locanaṃ prekṣye | tat kiṃ khalu priyasakhyā vinidratāyāḥ kāraṇam?
ekavallahā vi jā itthiā hoi tāe vi ṇiddā dullahā ṇāma | kiṃ uṇa amhāṇaṃ saalavallahāṇam?sakhi, ekavallabhāpi yā strī bhavati tasyā api nidrā durlabhā nāma | kiṃ punar asmākaṃ sakalavallabhānām?
ke uṇa piasahīe vallahā?ke punaḥ priyasakhyā vallabhāḥ?

mahārāo, tado uvari kāmo, koho, loho a | ahava alaṃ viseseṇa! ettha ule jo jādo hiaaṇihidae rattidiahāi ahiramaī mae ṇa viṇābālo ṭhaviro juvāṇo a |mahārājaḥ, tata upari kāmaḥ, krodho, lobhaś ca | athavālaṃ viśeṣeṇa! atra kule yo jāto hṛdayanihitayā rātridivasāy abhiramate mayā na vinā — bālaḥ sthavīro yuvānaś ca |

ṇaṃ kāmassa raï, kohassa hiṃsā, lohassa tiṇhā paramappia suṇiadi | tāsaṃ kadhaṃ piajaṇaṃ ṇiccaṃ ramaantī issaṃ ṇa jāṇesi?nanu kāmasya ratiḥ, krodhasya hiṃsā, lobhasya tṛṣṇā priyeti śrūyate | tāsāṃ kathaṃ priyajanān nityaṃ ramayantīrṣyāṃ na janayasi?
issatti kiṃ bhaṇiadi? tāo vi mae viṇā muhuttaṃ vi ṇa tussanti!īrṣyeti kiṃ bhaṇyate? tā api mayā vinā muhūrtam api na tuṣyanti!

ado jevva bhaṇāmi tuha sarisī suhaā iha puhivīe ṇatthi tti, jāe sohaggaveragguijariahiaāo savattīo vi sampasādaṃ paḍicchanti | sahi, aṇṇaṃ vi bhaṇāmi | evaṃ
ṇiddāulahiaā visaṃṭhulakkhalantacalaṇaneurajhaṃkāramuharāe gadīe mahārāaṃ saṃbhāvaaṃtī saṃkidahiaaṃ karissadi piasahitti takkemi |ata eva bhaṇāmi tava sadṛśī subhagā iha pṛthivyāṃ nāstīti, yasyāḥ saubhāgyavairāgyavijvaritahṛdayāḥ sapatnyo 'pi saṃprasādaṃ pratīcchanti | sakhi, anyad api bhaṇāmi | evaṃ nidrākulahṛdayā visaṃsthulaskhalaccaraṇanūpurajhaṅkāramukharayā gatyā mahārājaṃ saṃbhāvayantī śaṅkitahṛdayaṃ kariṣyati priyasakhīti tarkayāmi |

kiṃ ettha saṃkidavvaṃ? ṇaṃ amhāṇaṃ mahārāaṇiuttāṇaṃ jevva eso aviṇao | avi a, daṃsaṇamattappasādiapurusāṇaṃ juvaīṇaṃ kerisaṃ bhaam?kim atra śaṅkitavyam? na cāsmākaṃ mahārājaniyuktānām evaiṣo 'vinayaḥ | api ca darśanamātraprasāditapuruṣāṇāṃ yuvatīnāṃ kīdṛśaṃ bhayam |

sp.speaker: mahāmohaḥ
sp.p: vilokya | aye! saṃprāpteva priyā me mithyādṛṣṭiḥ | yaiṣā —

lg.l: śroṇībhārabharālasā daragalanmālyopavṛtticchalāllīlotkṣiptabhujopadarśitakuconmīlannakhāṅkāvaliḥ; |
nīlendīvaradāmadīrghatarayā dṛṣṭyā dhayantī manodorāndolanalolakaṅkaṇajhaṇatkārottaraṃ sarpati ||

p.seg: eso mahārāo | uvasappadu, piasahī |eṣa mahārājaḥ | upasarpatu priyasakhī |
jaadu, jaadu, mahārāo!jayatu, jayatu, mahārājaḥ!

lg.head: priye —
lg.l: dalitakucanakhāṅkam aṅkapālīṃracaya mamāṅkam upetya pīvaroru |
anuhara hariṇākṣi śaṅkarārdhasthitahimaśailasutāvilāsalakṣmīm ||

sp.speaker: mahāmohaḥ
sp.p: āliṅganasukham abhinīya aho, priyāyāḥ pariṣvāṅgāt parāvṛttaṃ navayauvanam | tathā hi —

lg.l: yaḥ prāg āsīd abhinavavayovibhramāvāptajanmā,cittonmāthī vigataviṣayopaplavānandasāndraḥ, |
vṛttīr antas tirayati tavāśleṣajanmā sa ko 'piprauḍhapremā nava iva punar mānmatho me vikāraḥ ||

p.seg: mahārāa, ahaṃ vi saṃpadaṃ ṇavajovvaṇā saṃvuttā | ṇa khu bhāvāṇubandho pammo kāleṇāvi vihaḍaï | āṇavedu, bhaṭṭā, kiṃṇimittaṃ bhaṭṭiṇā sumaridamhi?mahārāja, aham api sāṃprataṃ navayauvanā saṃvṛttā | na khalu bhāvānubandhaḥ premā kālenāpi vighaṭate | ājñāpayatu, bhartā, kin nimittaṃ bhartrā smṛtāsmi?

lg.head: priye —
lg.l: smaryate sā hi, vāmoru! cyutā yā hṛdayād bahiḥ; |
maccittabhittau, bhavatī, sālabhañjīva rājate ||

p.seg: mahappasādo!mahān prasādaḥ!

sp.speaker: mahāmohaḥ
sp.p: yathaiva prakāśitair aṅgaiḥ sarvatra vicarasi, tathaiva pravartitavyam | anyac ca — dāsyāḥ putrī śraddhā vivekena sahopaniṣadaṃ saṃyojayituṃ kuṭṭīnībhāvaṃ pratipannā | tataḥ —

lg.l: pratikūlām akulajāṃ pāpāṃ pāpānuvartinīm — |
keśeṣv ākṛṣyatāṃ raṇḍāṃ pāṣaṇḍeṣu niveśaya ||

p.seg: eddahamettae visae alaṃ bhaṭṭiṇo ahiṇiveseṇa! vaaṇamatteṇa vva bhaṭṭiṇo dāsa vva savvo aṇṇāṃ karissadi | sā khu mae mitthā dhammo, mitthā mokkho, mitthā veamaggo, mitthā suhavigghaarāiṃ sātthapalavidāiṃ, mitthā saggaphalaṃ ti bhaṇiantī veamaggaṃ jevva parihalissadi, kiṃ uṇa uvaṇisadam | avi a —etāvanmātre viṣaye alaṃ bhartur abhiniveśena! vacanamātreṇaiva bhartur dāsa iva sarva ājñāṃ kariṣyati | sā khalu mayā mithyā dharmo mithyā mokṣō mithyā vedamārgo mithyā sukhavighnakarāṇi mithyā śāstrapralapitāni mithyā svargaphalam iti bhaṇyamāna vedamārgam eva parihariṣyati kiṃ punar upaniṣadam | api ca —

lg.l: visaāṇandavimukke mokkhe dosāṇa daṃsaantīe , |
uvaṇisaā hi virattā jhatti karijjaï mae saddhā ||
viṣayānandavimukte mokṣe doṣān darśayantyā |
upaniṣadā hi viraktā jhaṭiti krīyate mayā śraddhā ||

sp.speaker: mahārājaḥ
sp.p: yady evaṃ suṣṭhu priyaṃ me saṃpāditaṃ priyayā | punar āliṅgya cumbati |

p.seg: hanta! paāse evvaṃ paütteṇa bhattuṇā lajjemi |hanta! prakāśa evaṃ pravṛttena bhartrā lajje |

sp.speaker: mahāmohaḥ
sp.p: tad bhavatu! svāgāram eva praviśāmaḥ |

milestone.n: iti śrīkṛṣṇamiśrayativiracite prabodhacandrodaye mahāmohapradhāno nāma divtīyo 'aṅkaḥ |

sp.speaker: śāntiḥ
sp.p: sāsram mātar, mātaḥ! kvāsi? dehi me prativacanam |

lg.l: muktātaṅkakuraṅgakā vanabhuvaḥ, śailāḥ skhaladvārayaḥ,puṇyāny āyatanāni, santatataponiṣṭhāś ca vaikhānasāḥ — |
yasyāḥ prī tī ti r amīṣu, sādya bhavatī caṇḍālaveśmodaraṃnītā gauḥ kapileva jīvati kathaṃ pāṣaṇḍahastaṃ gatā? ||

sp.p: athavālaṃ jīvitasaṃbhāvanayā! yataḥ,

lg.l: mām anālokya, na snāti, na bhuṅkte, na pibaty apaḥ |
na mayā rahitā śraddhā muhūrtam api jīvati ||

sp.p: tad vinā śraddhayā muhūrtam api śānter jīvitaṃ viḍambanam eva | tat sakhi, karuṇe, madarthaṃ citām āracaya! yāvad aciram eva hutāśanapraveśena tasyāḥ sahacarī bhavāmi |

p.seg: sahi, evvaṃ visamajjolaṇajjālāvalītikkhāiṃ akkharāiṃ jappantī savvahā viluttajīviaṃ maṃ karesi | tā pasīda muhuttaaṃ dhāredu jīviaṃ, piasahī | jāva ido tado puṇṇesu assamesu muṇiaṇasamāülesu bhāīrahītiresu suṇiuṇaṃ ṇirūvamha | sā kadāi vi mahāmohabhīdā kahaṃ vi pacchaṇṇaṃ ṇivasaï |sakhi, evaṃ viṣamajvalanajvālāvalītīkṣṇāny akṣarāṇi jalpantī sarvathā viluptajīvitāṃ māṃ karoṣi | tasmāt prasīda muhūrtaṃ dhārayatu jīvitaṃ, priyasakhī | yāvad itas tataḥ puṇyeṣv āśraṃeṣu munijanasamākuleṣu bhāgīrathītīreṣu sunipuṇaṃ nirūpayāvaḥ | sā kadācid api mahāmohabhītā katham api pracchannā nivasati |

sp.speaker: śāntiḥ
sp.p: sakhi, kiyad anviṣyate?

lg.l: nīvārāṅkitasaikatāni saritāṃ kūlāni vaikhānasairākrāntāni samiccaṣālacamasavyāptā gṛhā yajvanām — |
pratyekaṃ ca nirūpitāḥ pratipadaṃ catvāra evāśramāḥ,śraddhāyāḥ kvacid apy aho sakhi mayā vārtāpi nākarṇitā ||

p.seg: sahi, evvaṃ bhaṇāmi | jaï saccevva saddhā tado ṇa tāe īrisīṃ duggaïṃ saṃbhāvemi | ṇa khu tārisīo puṇṇamaīo tārisaṃ asaṃbhāvaṇijjaṃ vipattiṃ aṇuhondi |sakhi, evaṃ bhaṇāmi | yadi satyeva śraddhā tato na tasyā īdṛśīṃ durgatiṃ saṃbhāvayāmi | na khalu tādṛśyaḥ puṇyamayyaḥ tādṛśīṃ asaṃbhāvanīyāṃ vipattim anubhavanti |

sp.speaker: śāntiḥ
sp.p: sakhi, kin nu pratikūle vidhātari na saṃbhāvyate? tathā hi —

lg.l: śrīr devī janakātmajā daśamukhasyāsīd gṛhe rakṣasonītā caiva; rasātalaṃ bhagavatī pūrvaṃ trayī dānavaiḥ; |
gandharvasya madālasāṃ ca tanayāṃ pātālaketuś chalāddaityendro 'pajahāra — hanta! viṣamā vāmā vidher vṛttayaḥ ||

sp.p: tad bhavatu! pāṣaṇḍālayeṣv eva tāvad anusarāvaḥ |

p.seg: sahi, evaṃ hodu |sakhy evaṃ bhavatu |
sahi, rakkhaso, rakkhaso!sakhi, rākṣaso, rākṣasaḥ!

sp.speaker: śāntiḥ
sp.p: kvāsau rākṣasaḥ?

p.seg: pekkha, pekkha! jo eso galantamalapaṅkapicchilabībhacchaduppekkhedahacchaī! ulluṃchiaciurabharo mukkavasaṇavesaduddaṃsaṇo! sihisihaṇḍapiṃcchiāhattho | ido jevva ahivaṭṭadi |paśya, paśya! ya eṣa galanmalapaṅkapicchilabībhatsaduḥprekṣyadehacchavir ulluñchitacikurabharo muktavasanaveṣadurdarśanaḥ śikhiśikhaṇḍapicchikāhasta ita evābhivartate |

sp.speaker: śāntiḥ
sp.p: sakhi, nāyaṃ rākṣasaḥ | nirvīryaḥ khalv ayam |

p.seg: tā ko eso bhavissadi?tarhi ka eṣa bhaviṣyati |

sp.speaker: śāntiḥ
sp.p: sakhi, “piśāca” iti śaṅke?

p.seg: sahi, evvaṃ papphurantamaūhamālobbhāsiabhuaṇantarāe jalantappacaṇḍamaccaṇḍamaṇḍale diahamuhe kahaṃ pisāāṇaṃ avaāso?sakhi, evaṃ prasphuranmayūkhamālodbhāsitabhuvanāntarāle jvalatpracaṇḍamārtāṇḍamaṇḍale divasamukhe kathaṃ piśācānām avakāśaḥ?

sp.speaker: śāntiḥ
sp.p: tarhi anantaram eva narakavivarād uttīrṇaḥ ko 'pi nārakī bhaviṣyati! vilokya vicintya ca āḥ, jñātam! mahāmohapravartito 'yaṃ digambarasiddhāntaḥ | tat sarvathā dūre pariharaṇīyam asya darśanam | iti parāṅmukhībhavati

sp.speaker: karuṇā
sp.p: sahi, muhuttakaṃ ciṭṭha, jāva ido saddhāṃ aṇṇesāmi |sakhi, muhūrtaṃ tiṣṭha | yāvad itaḥ śraddhām anveṣayāmi | )

p.seg: ṇamo aluhantāṇam, aluhantāṇam! ṇavaduvālagharamajjhe appā divavva palittae | ese jiṇavalabhāsido palamattho mokkhasukkado dhammo! iti parikrāmati | ākāśe | le le sāvaā! suṇāha, suṇāha!namo 'rhadbhyo, 'rhadbhyaḥ! navadvāragṛhamadhye ātmā dīpa iva pradīptaḥ | eṣa jinavarabhāṣitaḥ paramārtho dharmo mokṣasaukhyadaḥ! re re śrāvakāḥ! śṛṇuta, śrṇuta!

lg.l: malamaapuggalapiṇḍe saalajalehiṃ vi kelisī suddhī? |
appā vimalasahāvo lisipalicalaṇehi jāṇavvo ||
malamayapudgalapiṇḍe sakalajalair api kīdṛśī śuddhiḥ? |
ātmā vimalasvabhāva ṛṣiparicaraṇair jñātavyaḥ ||

p.seg: kiṃ bhaṇāha, kelisaṃ lisipalicalaṇaṃ ti? taṃ suṇāha!kiṃ bhaṇatha, kīdṛśam ṛṣiparicaraṇam iti? tac chṛṇuta!

lg.l: dūle calaṇapaṇāmo, kidasakkālaṃ ca bhoaṇam miṭṭham, |
issāmalaṃ ṇa kajjaṃ, lisiṇaṃ dālaṃ lamantāṇam ||
dūre caraṇapraṇāmaḥ, kṛtasatkāraṃ ca bhojanaṃ mṛṣṭam, |
īrṣyāmalaṃ na kāryam, ṛṣīṇāṃ dārān ramamāṇānām ||

p.seg: saddhe, ido dāvaśraddhe, itas tāvat |

p.stage: ubhe sabhayam ālokayataḥ | tataḥ pra≤vśa≥«viśa»ti tadanurūpaveṣā śraddhā

sp.speaker: śraddhā
sp.p: kiṃ āṇavei lāaulaṃ?kim ājñāpayati rājakulam? )

p.seg: sāvaāṇaṃ kuḍumbaṃ muhuttaṃ pi mā paliccaa |śrāvakāṇāṃ kuṭumbaaṃ muhūrtam api mā parityaja |

sp.speaker: śraddhā
sp.p: jaṃ āṇavei lāaulamyad ājñāpayati rājakulam | )

p.seg: samassasaü piasahī | ṇahu ṇāmamatteṇa piasahīe bhedavvaṃ | jado sudaṃ mae ahiṃsāe saāsādo jaṃ atthi pāsaṇḍāṇaṃ vi tamassa sudā “saddhe” ti | teṇa esā tāmasī saddhā bhavissadi |samāśvasitu priyasakhī | na khalu nāmamātreṇa priyasakhyā bhetavyam | yataḥ śrutaṃ mayā ahiṃsāyāḥ sakāśād asti pāṣaṇḍānām api tamasaḥ sutā śraddheti | tenaiṣā tāmasī śraddhā bhaviṣyati |

sp.speaker: śāntiḥ
sp.p: samāśvasya | sakhi, evam evaitat | tathā hi,

lg.l: durācārā sadācārāṃ, durdarśā priyadarśanām, |
ambām anusaraty eṣā durāśā na kathaṃ cana ||

sp.p: tad bhavatu | tāvat saugatālayeṣv apy asāv anviṣyatām | śāntikaruṇe parikrāmataḥ

sp.speaker: bhikṣuḥ
sp.p: vicintya bho bhoḥ! upāsakāḥ!

lg.l: sākṣāt kṣaṇakṣayina eva nirātmakāś ca,yatrārpitā bahir iva pratibhānti bhāvāḥ |
saivādhunā vigalitākhilavāsanatvād,dhīsantatiḥ sphurati nirviṣayoparāgā ||

sp.p: parikramya punaḥ saślāgham | aho! sādhur ayaṃ saugatadharmo yatra saukhyaṃ mokṣaś ca | tathā hi —

lg.l: āvāso layanaṃ manoharam, abhiprāyānukūlā vaṇiṅnāryo, vāñchitakālam iṣṭam aśanaṃ, śayyā mṛduprastarāḥ |
śraddhāpūrvam upāsikāyuvatibhiḥ kḷptāṅgadānotsavakrīḍānandabharair vrajanti vilasajjyotsnāṅkurā rātrayaḥ ||

p.seg: sahi, ko eso? taruṇataratālatalupallavo lambantakasāapisaṅgacīracīvaro sacūḍamuṇḍiamuṇḍaveso ido jevva aḍiacchadi |sakhi, ka eṣa? taruṇataratālatarupallavo lambamānakaṣāyapiśaṅgacīracīvaro sacūḍamuṇḍitamuṇḍaveṣa ita evābhigacchati

sp.speaker: śāntiḥ
sp.p: sakhi, buddhāgama eṣaḥ |

sp.speaker: bhikṣuḥ
sp.p: ākāśe bho, bho! upāsakāḥ bhikṣavaś ca! śrūyatāṃ bhagavataḥ sugatasya vākyāmṛtam! pustakaṃ vācayati | paśyāmy ahaṃ divyena cakṣuṣā lokānāṃ sugatiṃ durgatiṃ ca | kṣaṇikāḥ sarve saṃskārāḥ | nāsty ātmā sthāyī | tasmād bhikṣuṣu dārān ākramatsu nerṣitavyam | cittamalaṃ hi tad yad īrṣyānāma | nepathyābhimukham avalokya | śraddhe! itas tāvat! praviśya śraddhā |

p.seg: āṇavedu lāaulam |ājñāpayatu rājakulam |

sp.speaker: bhikṣuḥ
sp.p: upāsakān bhikṣūṃś ca nirbharam āliṅgya sthīyatām!

sp.speaker: śraddhā
sp.p: jaṃ āṇavedi lāaulam |yad ājñāpayati rājakulam | )

sp.speaker: śāntiḥ
sp.p: sakhi, iyam api tāmasī śraddhā |

p.seg: evvaṃ edaṃ |evaṃ etat |
alele! bhikkhua! ido dāva | kiṃ pi pucchissam |arere! bhikṣuka! itas tāvat | kim api pṛcchāmi |

sp.speaker: bhikṣuḥ
sp.p: sakrodham āḥ! pāpa piśācākṛte! kim evaṃ pralapasi?

p.seg: ale, muñca koham | sācchagadaṃ pucchāmi |are, muñca krodham | śāstragataṃ pṛcchāmi |

sp.speaker: bhikṣuḥ
sp.p: are, kṣapaṇaka, śāstrakathām api vetsi! bhavatu | pratīmas tāvat | upasṛtya | kiṃ pṛcchasi?

p.seg: bhaṇa, dāva kkhaṇaviṇāsiṇā tue kassa kide vadaṃ dhālīadi?bhaṇa, tāvat kṣaṇavināśinā tvayā kasya kṛte vrataṃ dhāryate?

sp.speaker: bhikṣuḥ
sp.p: are, śrūyatām! asmatsaṃtatipatitaḥ kaścid, vijñānalakṣaṇaḥ, samucchinnavāsano, mokṣyate |

p.seg: ale! muccalajja! kassiṃ vi maṇṇantale ko vi mukko bhavissadi? tado de saṃpadaṃ ṇaṭṭhassa kīrisaṃ uvaālaṃ kalissadi? aṇṇaṃ vi pucchāmi — keṇa de īriso dhammo saṃdiṭṭho?are! muktalajja! kasminn api manvantare ko 'pi mukto bhaviṣyati? tatas te sāṃprataṃ naṣṭasya kīdṛśam upakāraṃ kariṣyati? anyad api pṛcchāmi | kena te īdṛśo dharma sandiṣṭaḥ?

sp.speaker: bhikṣuḥ
sp.p: nūnaṃ, sarvajñena bhagavatā buddhenokto 'yam eva dharmaḥ |

p.seg: ale! savvaṇṇo buddho tti kadhaṃ tue ṇādam?are! sarvajño buddha iti kathaṃ tvayā jñātam?

sp.speaker: bhikṣuḥ
sp.p: nanu re, tad āgamair eva prasiddho buddhaḥ sarvajña iti |

p.seg: ale! ujjiabuddhae! jaï tassa bhāsideṇa savvaṇṇattaṃ paḍivajjesi, tā ahaṃ vi savvaṃ jāṇāmi | tumaṃ pi pidupidāmahehiṃ sattapulisehiṃ me dāso tti!are! ujjhitabuddhika! yadi tasya bhāṣitena sarvajñatvaṃ pratipadyase, tasmād aham api sarvaṃ jānāmi | tvam api pitṛpitāmahaiḥ saptapuruṣair me dāsa iti!

sp.speaker: bhikṣuḥ
sp.p: sakrodham āḥ pāpa! piśāca malapaṅkadhara! kiṃ tāvad ahaṃ dāsaḥ?

p.seg: ale! vihāladāsībhuaṅga! duṭṭhapalivvajia, diṭṭhaṃdo mae daṃsido | tā piaṃ de vissaddhaṃ bhaṇāmi — buddhāṇusāsaṇaṃ palihalia alihantāṇusāsaṇaṃ jevva aṇusalidu bhavam | diambalamadaṃ ācaledu, bhavam!are! vihāradāsībhujaṅga! duṣṭaparivrājaka, dṛṣṭānto mayā darśitaḥ | tasmāt priyaṃ te visrabdhaṃ bhaṇāmi — buddhānuśāsanaṃ parihṛtyārhatānuśāsanam evānusaratu bhavān | digambaramatam eva ācarayatu, bhavān!

sp.speaker: bhikṣuḥ
sp.p: āḥ pāpa! svayaṃ naṣṭaḥ, parān api nāśayitum icchasi |

lg.l: svārājyaṃ prājyam utsṛjya loke nindyām aninditaḥ, |
abhivāñchati ko nāma bhavān iva piśācatām? ||

sp.p: api ca, ārhato api dharmavedanaṃ kaḥ śraddadhāti?

p.seg: gahaṇakkhattacālacandasullopalāadukhkhalapalamalahassāṇaṃ ādesasaṃvādadaṃsaṇeṇa ṇiluvidaṃ savvaṇṇattaṇaṃ bhaavado alihantassagrahanakṣatracāracandrasūryoparāgaduṣkaraparamarahasyānam ādeśasaṃvādadarśanena nirūpitaṃ sarvajñatvaṃ bhagavato 'rhataḥ

sp.speaker: bhikṣuḥ
sp.p: are! anādipravṛttena jyotiṣātīndriyajñānena pratāritena bhavatedam atikaṣṭaṃ vratam āśritam | tathā hi —

lg.l: jñātuṃ vapuḥparimitaḥ kṣamate trilokīṃjīvaḥ kathaṃ kathaya saṃgatim antareṇa? |
śaknoti kumbhanihitaḥ suśikho 'pi dīpobhāvān prakāśayitum apy udare gṛhasya? ||

sp.p: tasmāl lokadvayaviruddhād ārhatamatād varaṃ sugatamatam eva, sākṣāt sukhāvaham atiramaṇīyam paśyāmaḥ |

sp.speaker: śāntiḥ
sp.p: sakhi, anyato gacchāvaḥ |

sp.speaker: karuṇā
sp.p: evaṃ bhodu |evaṃ bhavatu | )

sp.speaker: śāntiḥ
sp.p: puro vilokya eṣa purastāt somasiddhāntaḥ | bhavatu, atrāpi tāvad anusarāvaḥ |

lg.l: narāsthimālākṛtacārubhūṣaṇaḥśmaśānavāsī nṛkapālabhojanaḥ, |
paśyāmi yogāñjanaśuddhacakṣuṣājagan mitho bhinnam abhinnam īśvarāt ||

p.seg: ale! ko eso kāvālaṃ vadaṃ dhāledi puliso | tāe ṇaṃ pucchissam | upasṛtya | alele, kāvālia! ṇalātthimuṇḍadhāi!, kīliso tuha śokkho kīliso tuha mokkho?are! ka eṣa kāpālaṃ vrataṃ dhārayati puruṣaḥ | tad enaṃ pṛcchāmi | are, kāpālika! narāsthimuṇḍadhārin! kīdṛśaṃ tava saukhyaṃ? kīdṛśas tava mokṣaḥ?

sp.speaker: kāpālīkāḥ
sp.p: are, kṣapaṇaka! dharmaṃ tāvad asmākam avadhāraya!

lg.l: mastiṣkāntravasābhidhāritamahāmāṃsāhutīr juhvatāṃ!vahnau brahmakapālakalpitasurāpānena naḥ pāraṇā |
sadyaḥkṛttakaṭhorakaṇṭhavigalatkīlāladhārojjvalairarcyo naḥ puruṣopahārabalibhir devo mahābhairavaḥ ||

sp.speaker: bhikṣuḥ
sp.p: karṇau pidhāya | buddha! buddha! aho dāruṇā dharmacaryā!

p.seg: alihanta! alihanta! aho gholaṃ pāvaṃ! kāvalieṇa keṇa vi vippaladdho eva eso tti takkemi!arhan! arhan! aho ghoraṃ pāpaṃ! kāpālikena kenāpi vipralabdha evaiṣa tarkayāmi!

sp.speaker: kāpālīkāḥ
sp.p: sakrodham āḥ pāpa pākhaṇḍāpaśada! muṇḍitamuṇḍa! caṇḍālaveśa! keśaluñcaka! are! vipralambhakaḥ kila caturdaśabhuvanotpattisthitipralayapravartako vedāntasiddhāntaprasiddhavibhavo bhagavān bhavānīpatiḥ? darśayāmas tarhi dharmasyāsya mahimānam?

lg.l: hariharasurajyeṣṭhaśreṣṭhān surān aham āhare |
viyati vahatāṃ nakṣatrāṇāṃ ruṇadhmi gatīr api |
sanaganagarīm ambhaḥpūrṇāṃ vidhāya mahīm imāṃ,kalaya sakalaṃ bhūyas toyaṃ kṣaṇena pibāmi tat ||

p.seg: ale, kāvālia! ṇaṃ ado jevva bhaṇāmi — keṇa vi endajālieṇā māāṃ daṃsia vippaladdho tti!are, kāpālika! nanv ata eva bhaṇāmi — kenāpy aindrajālikena māyāṃ darśayitvā vipralabdha iti!

sp.speaker: kāpālīkāḥ
sp.p:
āḥ pāpa! punar api parameśvaram aindrajālikam ity ākṣipasi? tan na marṣanīyam asya daurātmyam! khaḍgam ākṛṣya tad aham asya...
vargeṇa bhargagṛhiṇīṃ rudhirair dhinomi ||

lg.l: etatkarālakaravālanikṛttakaṇṭhanāloccaladbahulaphenilabudbudaughaiḥ, |
sārdhaṃ ḍamaḍḍamaruḍāṃkṛtihūtabhūta

sp.speaker: kṣapaṇakaḥ
bhikṣuḥ
sp.p: kāpālikaṃ vārayan bho, bho, mahābhāga! kautukaprayuktavākkalahenāyuktam etasmiṃs tapasvini prahartum |

p.seg: mahābhāo jaï saṃhalidagholalosāveso saṃvutto tado ahaṃ kiṃ vi pucchiduṃ icchemi |mahābhāgo, yadi saṃhṛtaghoraroṣāveśaḥ saṃvṛttaḥ, tato 'haṃ kim api praṣṭum icchāmi |

sp.speaker: kāpālīkāḥ
sp.p: pṛccha, pṛccha |

p.seg: sudo tumhāṇaṃ palamo dhammo | adha keliso sokkhamokkho tti?śruto yuṣmākaṃ paramo dharmaḥ | attha kīdṛśo mokṣa iti?

sp.speaker: kāpālīkāḥ
sp.p: śṛṇu!

lg.l: dṛṣṭaṃ kvāpi sukhaṃ vinā na viṣayair. ānandabodhojjhitājīvasya sthitir eva muktir upalāvasthā kathaṃ prārthyate? |
pārvatyāḥ pratirūpayā dayitayā sānandam āliṅgitomuktaḥ krīḍati candracūḍavapur. ity ūce mṛḍānīpatiḥ ||

sp.speaker: bhikṣuḥ
sp.p: mahābhāga, aśraddheyam etad avītarāgasya muktir iti |

p.seg: ale, kāvālia! jaï ṇa lussasi tado bhaṇāmi | salīlī salāgī mukko a tti viluddham |are, kāpālika! yadi na ruṣyasi tato bhaṇāmi | śarīrī muktaś ceti viruddham |

sp.speaker: kāpālīkāḥ
sp.p: svagatam aye! aśraddhākṣiptam anayor antaḥkaraṇam | bhavatv | evaṃ tāvat | prakāśam śraddhe! itas tāvat!

p.seg: sahi, pekkha! rajasas sudā saddhā | sā esā —sakhi, paśya! rajasaḥ sutā śraddhā | saiṣā —

lg.l: viphullaṇīluppalalolaloaṇā,ṇaratthimālākidacālubhūsaṇā, |
ṇiambapīṇatthaṇabhālamanthalā,vihādi puṇṇendumuhī vilāsiṇī ||
viphullanīlotpalalolalocanā,narāsthimālākṛtacārubhūṣaṇā, |
nitambapīnastanabhāramantharā,vibhāti pūrṇendumukhī vilāsinī ||

p.seg: esa mhi! āṇavedu sāmī |eṣāsmi! ājñāpayatu svāmī |

sp.speaker: kāpālīkāḥ
sp.p: priye, enaṃ durabhimāninaṃ bhikṣuṃ tāvad gṛhāṇa! śraddhā bhikṣum āliṅgati

sp.speaker: bhikṣuḥ
sp.p: sānandaṃ pariṣvajya, romāñcam abhinīya, janāntikam | aho! sukhasparśā kāpālinī | tathā hi —

lg.l: raṇḍāḥ pīnapayodharāḥ kati mayā caṇḍānurāgād bhujadvandvāpīḍitapīvarastanabharaṃ no gāḍham āliṅgitāḥ? |
buddhebhyaḥ śataśaḥ śape mayi punaḥ kutrāpi kāpālinīpīnottuṅgakucāvagūhanabhavaḥ prāptaḥ pramododayaḥ! ||

sp.p: aho! puṇyaṃ kāpālikacaritam! aho! ślāghyaḥ somasiddhāntaḥ! āścaryo 'yaṃ dharmaḥ! bho, mahābhāga! sarvathā buddhānuśāsanam asmābhir utsṛṣṭam praviṣṭāḥ smaḥ pārameśvaraṃ siddhāntam! tad ācāryas tvaṃ śiṣyo 'ham | praveśaya māṃ pārameśvarīṃ dīkṣām!

p.seg: ale, bhikkhua! kāvāliṇīphalasaṇeṇa dūsido tumam | tā dūlaṃ apasala!are, bhikṣo! kāpālinīsparśanena dūṣitas tvam | tasmād dūram apasara!

sp.speaker: bhikṣuḥ
sp.p: āḥ pāpa! vañcito 'si re kāpālinyāḥ parirambhamahotsavena!

sp.speaker: kāpālīkāḥ
sp.p: priye, kṣapaṇakaṃ gṛhāṇa | kāpāliṇī kṣapaṇakam āliṅgati

sp.speaker: kṣapaṇakaḥ

lg.l: ayi! pīṇaghaṇatthaṇasohiṇi! palitatthakulaṅgaviloalloaṇe! |
jaï lamasi kāvāliṇi, tā kiṃ kalissadi sāvakī? ||
ayi pīnaghanastanaśobhini! paritrastakuraṅgavilolalocane! |
yadi ramase kāpālini, tat kiṃ kariṣyati śrāvakī? ||

p.seg: aho, kāvāliaṃ jevva ekkaṃ daṃsaṇaṃ sokkhamokkhasāhaṇaṃ | bho, ācālia! ahaṃ tuha dāso saṃvutto | maṃ pi mahābhailavāṇusāsaṇe dīkkhedu!aho, kāpālikaṃ darśanam evaikaṃ saukhyamokṣasādhanam | bho, ācārya! ahaṃ tava dāsaḥ saṃvṛttaḥ | mām api mahābhairavānuśāsane dīkṣayata!

sp.speaker: kāpālīkāḥ
sp.p: upaviśyatām | ubhau tathā kurutaḥ |

p.seg: bhaavaṃ, palipūliaṃ sulāe bhāaṇam |bhagavan, paripūritaṃ surayā bhājanam |

lg.l: idaṃ pavitram amṛtam pīyatāṃ, bhavabheṣajam, |
paśupāśasamucchedakāraṇaṃ, bhairavoditam ||

p.seg: amhāṇaṃ alihantāṇusāsaṇe sulāpāṇaṃ ṇatthi |asmākam ārhatānuśāsane surāpānaṃ nāsti |

sp.speaker: bhikṣuḥ
sp.p: kathaṃ kāpālikocchiṣṭāṃ surāṃ pāsyāmi?

sp.speaker: kāpālīkāḥ
sp.p: kiñcid vimṛṣya | kiṃ vimṛśasi, śraddhe? paśutvam anayor nādyāpy apanīyate | tenāsmadvadanasaṃsargaduṣṭāṃ pavitrāṃ surām etau manyete | tad, bhavatī, svavaktrāsavapūtāṃ kṛtvānayor upanayatu | yatas tairthikā api vadanti “strīmukhaṃ tu sadā śuci” iti |

sp.speaker: śraddhā
sp.p: jaṃ bhaavaṃ āṇavedi!yad bhagavān ājñāpayati! )

sp.speaker: bhikṣuḥ
sp.p: mahān prasādaḥ! iti caṣakaṃ gṛhītvā pibati | aho! surāyāḥ saundaryam!

lg.l: nipītā veśyābhiḥ saha na kativārān suvadanāmukhocchiṣṭāsmābhiḥ sarasamadirāmodamadhurā? |
kapālinyā vaktrāsavasurabhim etāṃ tu madirāmalabdhvā jānīmaḥ spṛhayati sudhāyai suragaṇaḥ ||

p.seg: ale, bhikkhua! mā savvaṃ piba! kāvāliṇīvaaṇocchiṭṭhaṃ maïlaṃ maha vi dhālaedu!are bhikṣo! mā sarvaṃ piba! kāpālinīvadanocchiṣṭāṃ madirāṃ mamāpi dhārayatu!

aho, sulāe mahulattaṇam! aho, sādo! aho, gandho! aho, sulahittaṇam! cilaṃ khu alihantāṇusāsaṇe piḍido vañcido mhi ediseṇa sulālaseṇa! ale bhikkua, gholanti me aṅgāiṃ | tā uvaviśamhaaho, surāyā madhuratvam! aho, svādaḥ! aho, gandhaḥ! aho, surabhitvam! ciraṃ khalv ārhatānuśāsane patito vañcito 'smi īdṛśena surārasena! are bhikṣuka, ghūrṇanti me 'ṅgāni | tasmād upaviśāvaḥ |

sp.speaker: bhikṣuḥ
sp.p: evaṃ kurvaḥ | tathā kurutaḥ |

sp.speaker: kāpālīkāḥ
sp.p: priye, amūlyakrītaṃ dāsadvayaṃ labdham | tan nṛtyāvas tāvat! ubhau nṛtyataḥ |

p.seg: ale bhikkua | eso kāvālio — ahavo ācālio — kāvālinīe saddhaṃ sohaṇaṃ ṇaccedi | tā edāe saddhaṃ amhe vi ṇaccāmha!are bhikṣuka | eṣa kāpāliko — 'thavācāryaḥ — kāpālinyā sārdhaṃ śobhanaṃ nṛtyati | tasmād etābhyāṃ sahāvām api nṛtyāvaḥ!

sp.speaker: bhikṣuḥ
sp.p: ācārya, mahāścaryam etad darśanaṃ! yatrākleśam abhimatārthasiddhayaḥ saṃpadyante! madaskhalitaṃ nṛtyataḥ |

sp.speaker: kāpālīkāḥ
sp.p: kiyad etad āścaryaṃ paśya!

lg.l: yatrānujjhitavāñchitārthaviṣayāsaṅge 'pi sidhyanty amūḥpratyāsannamahodayapraṇayinām aṣṭau mahāsiddhayaḥ, |
vaśyākarṣavimohanapramathanaprakṣobhaṇoccāṭanaprāyaḥ prākṛtasiddhayas tu viduṣāṃ yogāntarāyāḥ param ||

p.seg: ale kāpālia, vimṛśya ahava ācālia, ācālialāa, kulācālia |are kāpālika, athavā ācārya, ācāryarāja, kulācārya |

sp.speaker: bhikṣuḥ
sp.p: vihasya ayam anabhyāsātiśayapītayā madirayā dūram unmattīkṛtas tapasvī! tat kriyatām asya madāpanayanam!

sp.speaker: kāpālīkāḥ
sp.p: evaṃ bhavatu | iti svamukhocchiṣṭaṃ tāmbūlaṃ kṣapaṇakāya dadāti

p.seg: ācāliaṃ evva edaṃ pucchissam | jādisī tuha sulāe āhalaṇattī kiṃ tādisī itthiāpulisesu vi atthi?ācāryam ev' aitat pṛcchāmi | yādṛśī tava surāyā āharaṇaśaktiḥ kiṃ tādṛśī strīpuruṣeṣv apy asti?

sp.speaker: kāpālīkāḥ
sp.p: kiṃ viśeṣeṇa pṛcchyate? paśya —

lg.l: vidyādhārīṃ vātha surāṅganāṃ vā,nāgāṅganāṃ vāpy atha yakṣakanyām, |
yad yan mameṣṭaṃ bhuvanatraye 'pividyābalāt tat tad upāharāmi ||

p.seg: bho, edaṃ mae gaṇideṇa ṇṇādaṃ — jaṃ savve amhe mahālāamahāmohassa kiṃkale tti |bho, etan mayā gaṇitena jñātam — yat sarve vayaṃ mahārājamahāmohasya kiṃkarā iti |

sp.speaker: ubhau
sp.p: yathājñātam āyuṣmatā, evam etat |

p.seg: tā lāakajjaṃ mantīyadu |tasmād rājakāryaṃ mantrayatām

sp.speaker: kāpālīkāḥ
sp.p: kiṃ tat?

p.seg: sattassa sudā saddhā mahālāassa aṇṇāe āhalaṇīe tti |sattvasya sutā śraddhā mahārājasyājñayāharaṇiyeti |

sp.speaker: kāpālīkāḥ
sp.p: kathaya kvāsau dāsyāḥ putrī? eṣa tām aciram eva vidyābalād upāharāmi |

sp.speaker: śāntiḥ
sp.p: sakhi, ambām uddviśyaiva hatāśānām ālāpaḥ śṛṇomi; tad avadhānena tāvad ākarṇayāvaḥ |

sp.speaker: karuṇā
sp.p: sahi, evvaṃ karemha |sakhi, evaṃ kurvaḥ | )

lg.l: ṇatthi jale, ṇatthi vaṇe, ṇatthi gilibilesu, ṇatthi pāāle, |
sā viṇṇubhattisahidā ṇivasadi hiae mahappāṇam ||
nāsti jale, nāsti vane, nāsti giribileṣu, nāsti pātāle, |
sā viṣṇubhaktisahitā nivasati hṛdaye mahātmanām ||

p.seg: sahi, diṭṭhiā vaḍḍhasi | sudaṃ viṇṇubhattīe devīe pāsavaṭṭiṇī saddhe tti |sakhi, diṣṭyā vardhase | śrutaṃ viṣṇubhaktyā devyāḥ pārśvavartinī śraddheti |

sp.speaker: bhikṣuḥ
sp.p: atha dharmasya kāmād apakrāntasya kutra pravṛttiḥ?

lg.l: ṇatthi jale, ṇatthi vaṇe, ṇatthi gilibilesu, ṇatthi pāāle, |
sā viṇṇubhattisahido vattaï hiae mahappāṇam ||
nāsti jale, nāsti vane, nāsti giribileṣu, nāsti pātāle, |
sa viṣṇubhaktisahito vartate hṛdaye mahātmanām ||

sp.speaker: kāpālīkāḥ
sp.p: saviṣādam aho mahat kaṣṭam āpatitaṃ mahārājasya! tathā hi —

lg.l: mūlaṃ devī siddhaye viṣṇubhaktis,tāṃ ca śraddhānuvratā sattvakanyā; |
kāmān muktas tatra dharmo 'py abhūc cet,siddhaṃ manye tad vivekasya sādhyam ||

sp.p: tathāpi tāvad asuvyayenāpi svāminaḥ prayojanam anuṣṭheyam | tan mahābhairavīṃ vidyāṃ dharmaśraddhayor āharaṇāya prasthāpayāmaḥ | iti niṣkrāntāḥ

sp.speaker: śāntiḥ
sp.p: āvām apy evaṃ hatāśānāṃ vyavasāyaṃ devyai viṣṇubhaktyai nivedayāvaḥ |

milestone.n: iti śrīkṛṣṇamiśrayativiracite prabodhacandrodaye pāṣaṇḍaviḍambhano nāma tṛtīyo 'ṅkaḥ |

sp.speaker: maitrī
sp.p: sudaṃ mae mudiāsaāsādo jaṃ mahābhairavīkahaḍhaṇasambhamādo bhaavadīe viṇṇubhattīe parittādā piasahī saddheti | tā ukkaṇṭhieṇa hiaeṇa piasahīṃ pekkhissam |śrutaṃ mayā muditāsakāśād yan mahābhairavīkarṣaṇasaṃbhramato bhagavatyā viṣṇubhaktyā paritrātā priyasakhī śraddheti | tasmād utkaṇṭhitena hṛdayena priyasakhīṃ prekṣiṣye | )

lg.l: ghorāṃ, nārakapālakuṇḍalavatīṃ, vidyucchaṭā dṛṣṭibhirmuñcantīṃ, vikarālamūrtim analajvālāpiśaṅgaiḥ kacaiḥ |
daṃṣṭrācandrakalāṅkurāntaravalajjihvāṃ mahābhairavīṃpaśyantyā iva, me manaḥ kadalikevādyāpy aho vepate ||

p.seg: ae! esā me piasahī bhaasambhāntahiaā, kalidakampataralehiṃ aṅgehiṃ kiṃ vi mantaantī | saṃmuhāadaṃ vi maṃ ṇa lakkhedi! ālavissaṃ dāva | prakāśam piasahi, saddhe! kisa tumaṃ uttāviahiaā maṃ vi ṇa āloesi?aye! eṣā me priyasakhī bhayasambhrāntahṛdayākalitakampataralair aṅgaiḥ kiṃ api mantrayantī saṃmukhāgatām api māṃ na lakṣayatī! ālapiṣye tāvat | priyasakhi, śraddhe! kasmāt tvam uttāpitahṛdayā mām api nālokayasi?

sp.speaker: śraddhā
sp.p: vilokya socchvāsam aye! me priyasakhī maitrī!

lg.l: kālarātrikarālāsyadantāntargatayā mayā, |
dṛṣṭāsi sakhi saiva tvaṃ punar atraiva janmani ||

sp.p: tad ehi pariṣvajasva mām!

p.seg: sahi, taha viṇṇubhattiṇibbhatthidappabhāvāe mahābhairavīe kaḍḍhaṇasambhamādo ajja vi vevandi de aṅgāi |sakhi, tathā viṣṇubhaktinirbhartsitaprabhāvayā mahābhairavyāḥ karṣaṇasambhramato 'dyāpi vepante te 'ṅgāni |
aho! hadāsā gholadaṃsaṇā! adha tāe āadāe kiṃ kidaṃ?aho! hatāśā ghoradarśanā! atha tayāgatayā kiṃ kṛtam?

lg.head: śṛṇu —
lg.l: śyenāvapātam avapatya padadvaye māmādāya dharmam apareṇa kareṇa ghorā |
vegena sā gaganam utpatitā nakhāgrakoṭisphuratpiśitapiṇḍayugeva gṛdhrī ||

sp.speaker: maitrī
sp.p: haddhī! haddhī!hā dhik! hā dhik! )

sp.speaker: śraddhā
sp.p: sakhi, samāśvasihi, samāśvasihi!

p.seg: tado tado?tatas tataḥ?

sp.speaker: śraddhā
sp.p: tataḥ param asmadīyārtanādasañjātadayayā devyā viṣṇubhaktyā —

lg.l: bhrūbhaṅgabhīmaparipāṭaladṛṣṭipātam,udgāḍhakopakuṭilaṃ ca tathā vyaloki, |
sā vajrapātahataśailaśileva bhūmau,vyābhugnajarjaratarāsthi yathā papāta ||

p.seg: diṭṭhiā miī via saddūlamuhādo pabbhaṭṭā saddhā kkhemeṇa saṃjīviā piasahī! tado tado?diṣtyā mṛgīva śārdūlamukhāt prabhraṣṭā śraddhā kṣemeṇa sañjīvitā priyasakhī | tatas tataḥ?

sp.speaker: śraddhā
sp.p: tato devyā samupajātābhiniveśayā kathitam, “evaṃ asya durātmano mahāmohahatakasya mām avajñāya pravartamānasya samūlam unmūlanaṃ kariṣyamīti”! ādiṣṭā cāhaṃ devyā yathā, “gaccha, śraddhe, brūhi vivekam kāmakrodhādīnāṃ nirjayāyodyogaḥ kriyatām | tato vairāgyaṃ prādurbhaviṣyati | ahaṃ ca yathāsamayaṃ prāṇāyāmādyanuṣṭhānena yuṣmatsainyam anugrahīṣyāmi | ṛtaṃbharādayaś ca devyaḥ śāntyādikauśalenopaniṣaddevyā saṃgatasya bhavataḥ prabodhodayam anuvidhāsyantīti” | tad aham idānīṃ vivekaniketaṃ prati prasthitā | tvaṃ punaḥ kim ācarantī divasān ativāhayasi?

sp.speaker: maitrī
sp.p:
amhe vi catasso baïṇīo viṇṇubhattīe āṇāe viveasiddhikālaṇaṃ mahappāṇam hiae vaṭṭamha |vayam api catasro bhaginyo viṣṇubhakter ājñayā vivekasiddhikāraṇaṃ mahātmanāṃ hṛdaye vartāmahe | ) te hi —
puṇyakriyeṣu muditāṃ, kumatāv upekṣām, |

lg.l: dhyāyanti māṃ sukhini, duḥkhini cānukampāṃ,
evaṃ prasādam upayāti hi rāgalobhadveṣādidoṣakaluṣo 'py ayam antarātmā ||

sp.p: evaṃ catasro 'pi bhaginyo vayaṃ tadabhyudayakāraṇenaiva vāsarān nayāmaḥ | kutredānīṃ priyasakhī mahārājam avalokayiṣyati?

sp.speaker: śraddhā
sp.p: devyaivedam uktam — “asti rāḍhābhidhāno janapadaḥ | tatra bhāgīrathīparisarālaṃkārabhūte cakratīrthe, mīmāṃsānugatayā matyā kathañcid dhāryamāṇaprāṇo, vyākulenāntarātmanā, viveka upaniṣaddevyāḥ saṃgamārthaṃ tapasyatīti” |

p.seg: tā gacchaü, piasahī! ahaṃ vi taṇṇioaṃ aṇuciṭṭhāmi |tasmād gacchatu, priyasakhī! aham api tanniyogam anutiṣṭhāmi |

sp.speaker: śraddhā
sp.p: evaṃ bhavatu |
iti niṣkrānte | viṣkambhakaḥ

sp.speaker: rājā
sp.p: āḥ! pāpa mahāmohahataka! sarvathā hatas tvayāyaṃ mahājanaḥ | tathā hi —

lg.l: śānte 'nantamahimni nirmalacidānande taraṅgāvalīnirmukte 'mṛtasāgarāmbhasi manāṅ magno 'pi nācāmati, |
niḥsāre mṛgatṛṣṇikārṇavajale śrānto 'pi mūḍhaḥ pibaty ācāmaty avagāhate 'bhiramate majjaty athonmajjati ||

sp.p: athavā saṃsāracakravāhakasya mahāmohasyābodho mūlam | tasya ca tattvāvabodhād eva nivṛttiḥ | yataḥ —

lg.l: amuṣya saṃsārataror abodhamūlasya nonmūlavināśanāya, |
viśveśvarārādhanabījajātāt tattvāvabodhād aparo 'bhyupāyaḥ ||
“prāyaḥ sukṛtinām arthe devā yānti sahāyatām, |
apanthānaṃ tu gacchantaṃ sodaro 'pi vimuñcati ||

sp.p:
iti tattvavido vyāharanti | tathā ca devyā viṣṇubhaktyā samādiṣṭam “udyogaḥ kriyatām kāmādivijaye | tad aham api bhavadarthe gṛhītapakṣaiveti” | tatra kāmas tāvat vastuvicāreṇ
aiva jīyate | tad bhavatu | tam eva tāvat tannirvijayāyādiśāmi | vetravati! āhūyatāṃ vastuvicāraḥ!

sp.speaker: pratīhārī
sp.p: jaṃ devo āṇavedi |jaṃ devo āṇavedi | )

sp.speaker: vastuvicāraḥ
sp.p: aho! nirvicārasaundaryābhimānavardhiṣṇunā kāmahatakena vañcitaṃ jagat | athavā durātmanā mahāmohenaiva! tathā hi —

lg.l: kāntety, utpalalocaneti, vipulaśroṇībharety, unnamatpīnottuṅgapayodhareti, sumukhāmbhojeti, subhrūr iti — |
dṛṣṭvā mādyati modate 'bhiramate prastauti vidvān apipratyakṣāśuciputrikāṃ striyam. aho mohasya duśceṣṭitam! ||

sp.p: api ca yathāvastu vicārayatām amandamatīnām api piśitapiṇḍāvanaddhāsthipañjaramayī svabhāvadurgandhabībhatsaveṣā nārīti nāsti vimatiḥ | tatra vispaṣṭa eva tāvad itaraguṇādhyāsaḥ | tathā hi —

lg.l: muktāhāralatā raṇanmaṇimayā haimās tulākoṭayorāgaḥ kuṅkumasaṃbhavaḥ surabhayaḥ pauṣpā vicitrāḥ srajaḥ, |
vāsaś citradukūlam alpamatibhir nāryām aho kalpitambāhyāntaḥ paripaśyatāṃ tu nirayaṃ nārīti nāmmā kṛtaṃ ||

sp.p: ākāśe āḥ! pāpa kāmacaṇḍāla! kim evam anālambanam evāvirbhavatā bhavatā vyākulīkriyate mahājanaḥ? tathā hy ayam evaṃ manyate —

lg.l: “bālā mām iyam icchatīnduvadanā sānandam udvīkṣate, |
nīlendīvaralocanā mama parīrambhaṃ bhṛśaṃ vāñchati ||

sp.p: are mūḍha!

lg.l: kā tvām icchati? kā ca paśyati? paśo! māṃsāsthibhir nirmitā |
nārī veda na kiṃcid atra, sa punaḥ paśyaty amūrtaḥ pumān ||

p.seg: ido ido edu, mahābhāo! ity ubhau parikrāmataḥ | eso mahārāo ciṭṭhadi | tā uvasappadu bhavam |ita ita etu, mahābhāgaḥ! eṣa mahārājas tiṣṭhati | tad upasarpatu bhavān |

sp.speaker: vastuvicāraḥ
sp.p: upasṛtya jayatu, jayatu, devaḥ! eṣa vastuvicāraḥ praṇamati |

sp.speaker: rājā
sp.p: ihopaviśyatām |

sp.speaker: vastuvicāraḥ
sp.p: upaviśya deva, eṣa te kiṅkaraḥ saṃprāptaḥ | tad ājñayānugṛhyatām!

sp.speaker: rājā
sp.p: mahāmohena sahāsmākaṃ saṃpravṛttaḥ saṅgrāmaḥ | tad atra kāmas tasya prathamo vīraḥ | tasya ca prativīratayāsmābhir bhavān eva nirūpitaḥ |

sp.speaker: vastuvicāraḥ
sp.p: dhanyo 'smi, yena svāmināham evaṃ saṃbhāvitaḥ |

sp.speaker: rājā
sp.p: atha kayā śastravidyayā bhavān kāmaṃ jeṣyati?

sp.speaker: vastuvicāraḥ
sp.p: āḥ! pañcaśaraḥ kusumadhanvā jetavya ity atrāpi śastragrahaṇāpekṣā | paśya —

lg.l: dṛḍhataram apidhāya dvāram ārāt kathañcitsmaraṇaviparivṛttau darśane yoṣitām vā, |
pariṇativirasatvaṃ dehabībhatsatāṃ vāpratipadam anucintyonmūlayiṣyāmi kāmam ||

sp.speaker: rājā
sp.p: sādhu, sādhu |

sp.speaker: vastuvicāraḥ

lg.head: api ca —
lg.l: vipulapulināḥ kallolinyo nirantaranirjharīmasṛṇitaśilāḥ śailāḥ sāndradrumā vanarājayaḥ, |
yadi śamagiro vaiyāsikyo budhaiś ca samāgamaḥ —kva piśitavasāmayyo nāryas? tadā kva ca manmathaḥ? ||

sp.p: nārīti nāma prathamam astraṃ kāmasya | tena tasyāṃ jitāyāṃ, tatsahāyāḥ sarva eva viphalārambhā bhaṅgam āsādayiṣyanti | tathā hi —

lg.l: candraś candanam indudhāmadhavalā rātryo dvirephāvalījhaṅkāronmukharā vilāsavipinopāntā vasantodayaḥ, |
mandradhvānaghanodayāś ca divasā mandāḥ kadambānilāḥ —śṛṅgārapramukhāś ca kāmasuhṛdo nāryāṃ jitāyāṃ jitāḥ ||

sp.p: tad alam ativilambena | ādiśatu svāmī |

lg.l: so 'haṃ prakīrṇaiḥ parito vicāraiḥśarair ivonmathya balaṃ pareṣām, |
sainyaṃ kurūṇām iva sindhurājaṃgāṇḍīvadhanveva nihanmi kāmam ||

sp.speaker: rājā
sp.p: tat sajjībhavatu, bhavāñ, śatruvijayāya!

sp.speaker: vastuvicāraḥ
sp.p: yad ādiśati devaḥ | iti niṣkrāntaḥ

sp.speaker: rājā
sp.p: vetravati! krodhasya vijayāya kṣamāhūyatām!

sp.speaker: pratīhārī
sp.p: jaṃ devo āṇavedi |yad deva ājñāpayati | )
kṣamā —

lg.l: krodhāndhakāravikaṭabhrukuṭītaraṅgabhīmasya sāndhyakiraṇāruṇaghoradṛṣṭeḥ, |
niṣkampanirmalagabhīrapayodhidhīrādhīrāḥ parasya parivādagiraḥ kṣamante ||

sp.p: saślāgham ātmānaṃ nirvarṇya aho! aham...

lg.l: klamo na vācāṃ, śiraso na śūlaṃ,na cittatāpo, na tanor vimardaḥ, |
na cāpi hiṃsādir anarthayogaḥ,ślāghyā paraṃ krodhajaye 'ham ekā ||

p.seg: eso devo | uvasappatu, piasahī |eṣa devaḥ | upasarpatu priyasakhī |

sp.speaker: kṣamā
sp.p: upasṛtya jayatu, jayatu, devaḥ! eṣā devasya dāsī kṣamā sāṣṭāṅgaṃ praṇamati |

sp.speaker: rājā
sp.p: kṣame, atropaviśyatām |

sp.speaker: kṣamā
sp.p: upaviśya ājñāpayatu devaḥ | kim artham āhūto dāsajanaḥ?

sp.speaker: rājā
sp.p: kṣame, asmin saṅgrāme durātmā krodhas tvayā jetavyaḥ |

sp.speaker: kṣamā
sp.p:
devasyānugrahān mahāmoham api jetuṃ paryāptāsmi; kiṃ punaḥ krodhaṃ tanucaramātram? tad aham acirād eva ...
svādhyāyadevapitṛyajñatapaḥkriyāṇām, |

lg.l: taṃ pāpakāriṇam akāraṇabādhitāraṃ
krodhaṃ sphuliṅgam iva dṛṣṭibhir udvamantaṃ —kātyāyanīva mahiṣaṃ vinivārya hanmi ||

sp.speaker: rājā
sp.p: kṣame, śṛṇumas tāvat krodhavijayopāyam |

sp.speaker: kṣamā
sp.p: deva, vijñāpayāmi |

lg.l: “kruddhe — smeramukhāvadhīraṇam, athāviṣṭe — prasādakramo,vyākrośe — kuśaloktir, ātmaduritocchedotsavastāḍane |
dhig! jantor ajitātmano 'sya mahatī daivād upetā vipaddurvāreti” dayārasārdramanasaḥ, krodhasya kutrodayaḥ? ||

sp.speaker: rājā
sp.p: sādhu, sādhu |

sp.speaker: kṣamā
sp.p: deva, krodhasya vijayād eva tad anuyāyino 'pi hiṃsāpāruṣyamānamātsaryādayo vijitā eva bhaviṣyanti |

sp.speaker: rājā
sp.p: tat pratiṣṭhatāṃ bhavatī vijayāya |

sp.speaker: kṣamā
sp.p: yad ājñāpayati devaḥ | iti niṣkrāntā |

sp.speaker: rājā
sp.p: pratīhārīṃ prati vetravati! āhūyatāṃ lobhasya jetā saṃtoṣaḥ!

sp.speaker: pratīhārī
sp.p: jaṃ devo āṇavedi |yad deva ājñāpayati | ) santoṣaḥ vicintya sānukrośam

lg.l: phalaṃ svecchālabhyaṃ prativanam akhedaṃ kṣitiruhāṃ |
payaḥ sthāne sthāne śiśiramadhuraṃ puṇyasaritām |
mṛdusparśā śayyā sulalitalatāpallavamayī |
sahante santāpaṃ tad api dhanināṃ dvāri kṛpaṇāḥ ||

sp.p: ākāśe are mūrkha! durucchedaḥ khalv ayaṃ bhavato vyāmohaḥ | tathā hi —

lg.l: samārambhā bhagnāḥ kati kati na vārāṃs tava paśoḥ,pipāsos tucche 'smin draviṇamṛgatṛṣṇārṇavajale? |
tathāpi pratyāśā viramati na te? nāpi śatadhāvidīrṇaṃ yacceto niyatam aśanigrāvaghaṭitam? ||

sp.p:
idaṃ ca te lobhāndhasya ceṣṭitaṃ cetasi camatkāram ātanoti! yataḥ —
sarvagrāsam iyaṃ grasiṣyati, mahālobhāndhakārāvṛtam ||

lg.l: “lapsye, labdham idaṃ ca, labhyam adhikaṃ; tanmūlalabhyaṃ tatolabhyaṃ cāparam |” ity anāratam aho labhyaṃ dhanaṃ dhyāyasi, |
naitad vetsi — punar bhavantam acirād āśāpiśācī balāt

lg.head: api ca —
lg.l: dhanaṃ tāval labdhaṃ katham api tathāpy asya niyato,vyayo vā nāśo vā tava sati viyogo 'sty ubhayathā |
anutpādaḥ śreyān kim u kathaya pathyo 'tha vilayo?vināśo labdhasya vyathayatitarāṃ; na tv anudayaḥ ||

lg.head: kiñca —
lg.l: mṛtyur nṛtyati mūrdhni, śaśvad uragī ghorā jarārūpiṇītvām eṣā grasate, parigrahamayair gṛdhrair jagad grasyate |
dhūtvā bodhajalair abodhabahulaṃ tallobhajanyaṃ rajaḥ,santoṣāmṛtasāgarāmbhasi punar magnaḥ sukhaṃ jīvati ||

p.seg: eso sāmi | tā uvasappatu, mahābhāo!eṣa svāmī | tad upasarpatu, mahābhāgaḥ!

sp.speaker: santoṣaḥ
sp.p: tathā kṛtvā | jayatu, jayatu, svāmī! eṣa santoṣaḥ praṇamati!

sp.speaker: rājā
sp.p: ihopaviśyatām | iti svasannidhāv upaveśayati |

sp.speaker: santoṣaḥ
sp.p: savinayam upaviśya eṣa preṣyajanaḥ | ājñāpyatāṃ devena |

sp.speaker: rājā
sp.p: viditaprabhāvo bhavān, tad alam ativilambena | lobhaṃ jetuṃ vārāṇasīṃ prati pratiṣṭhatām |

sp.speaker: santoṣaḥ
sp.p: yad ājñāpayati devaḥ | so 'ham —

lg.l: nānāmukhaṃ vijayinaṃ jagatāṃ trayāṇāṃdevadvijātivadhabandhanalabdhavṛddhim, |
rakṣo'dhinātham iva dāśarathiḥ prasahyanirjitya lobham avaśaṃ tarasā pinaṣmi ||

sp.speaker: puruṣaḥ
sp.p: deva, saṃbhṛtāni vijayaprayāṇamaṅgalāni, pratyāsannaś ca mauhūrtikāveditaḥ prasthānasamayaḥ |

sp.speaker: rājā
sp.p: yady evaṃ, senāprasthāpanāyādiśyantāṃ senāpatayaḥ |

sp.speaker: puruṣaḥ
sp.p: yad ājñāpayati devaḥ | iti niṣkrāntaḥ

sp.speaker: (nepathye)
sp.p: bho, bhoḥ! sainikāḥ!

lg.l: sajjyantāṃ kumbhabhitticyutamadamadirāmattabhṛṅgāḥ karīndrā!yujyantāṃ syandaneṣu prasabhajitamaruccaṇḍavegās turaṅgāḥ! |
kuntair nīlotpalānāṃ vanam iva kakubhām antarāle sṛjantaḥpādātāḥ saṃcarantu, prasabham asilasatpāṇayo 'py aśvavārāḥ ||

sp.speaker: rājā
sp.p: bhavatu! kṛtamaṅgalāḥ pratiṣṭhāmahe | pāripārśvakaṃ prati sārathir ādiśyatāṃ sāṅgrāmikaṃ rathaṃ sajjīkṛtyopanayeti |

sp.speaker: pāripārśvakaḥ
sp.p: yad ājñāpayati devaḥ | iti niṣkrāntaḥ

p.stage: tataḥ praviśati yathoktaṃ ratham ādāya sārathiḥ |

sp.speaker: sārathiḥ
sp.p: deva! sajjīkṛto rathaḥ | tad ārohatv, āyuṣmān | rājā kṛtamaṅgalavidhir ārohaṇaṃ nāṭayati |

sp.speaker: sārathiḥ
sp.p: rathavegaṃ nirūpayan āyuṣman, paśya, paśya —

lg.l: uddhūtapāṃsupaṭalānumitaprabandhadhāvatkhurāgracayacumbitabhūmibhāgāḥ, |
nirmathyamānajaladhidhvanighoraheṣam,ete rathaṃ gaganasīmni vahanti vāhāḥ ||

sp.p:
iyaṃ ca nātidūre darśanapatham avatīrṇā tribhuvanapāvanī vārāṇasī nagarī |
vibhāvyante bhūyaḥ śaśikararucaḥ saudhaśikharāḥ |

lg.l: amī dhārāyantraskhalitajalajhātkāramukharā,
vicitrā yatroccaiḥ śaradamalameghāntavilasattaḍillekhālakṣmīṃ vitarati patākāvalir iyam ||

sp.p: etāś ca pratimukulalagnamadhupāvalīraṇitamukharā, jṛmbhārambhavigalanmakarandabindudurdināḥ kusumasurabhayo nātidūre śyāmāyamānaghanacchadacchāyātaravo, nagaraparyantāraṇyabhūmayaḥ | yatraite maruto 'pi gṛhītapāśupatavratā dhūlim uddhūlayantas tāpasā iva lakṣyante | tathā hi —

lg.l: toyārdrāḥ surasaritaḥ sitāḥ parāgair,arcantaś cyutakusumair ivendumaulim, |
prodgītāṃ madhuparutaiḥ stutiṃ paṭhanto —nṛtyanti pracalalatābhujaiḥ samīrāḥ ||
eṣāntardadhatī tamovighaṭanād ānandam ātmaprabhaṃ,cetaḥ karṣati candracūḍavasatir vidyeva mukteḥ padam |
bhūmeḥ kaṇṭhavilambinīva kuṭilā muktāvalir jāhnavī,yatraivaṃ hasatīva phenapaṭalair vakrāṃ kalām aindavīm ||

sp.speaker: sūtaḥ
sp.p: parikramya āyuṣman, paśya, paśya! tad idaṃ surasaritparisarālaṃkārabhūtaṃ bhagavataḥ pāvanam anāder ādikeśavasya viṣṇor āyatanam |

sp.speaker: rājā
sp.p: saharṣam are!

lg.l: eṣa devaḥ purāvidbhiḥ kṣetrasyātmeti gīyate; |
atra dehaṃ samutsṛjya puṇyabhājo viśanti yam ||

sp.speaker: sūtaḥ
sp.p: āyuṣman, paśya, paśya! ete tāvat kāmakrodhalobhādayo 'smaddarśanamātrād eveto deśād dūram atikrāmanti!

sp.speaker: rājā
sp.p: evam etat! tad bhavatu | svābhīṣṭasiddhaye bhagavantaṃ namasyāmaḥ | rathād avatīrya praviśyāvalokya ca | jaya, jaya, bhagavan! amaracayacamūcakracūḍamaṇiśreṇinīrājitopāntapādadvayāmbhoja! rājannakhadyotakirmīritasvarṇapīṭha! sphuraddvaitavibhrāntisantānasantāpasantaptavandārusaṃsāranidrāpahāraikadakṣa! kṣamāmaṇḍaloddhārasaṃhārasaṃghaṭṭasaṃghṛṣṭadaṃṣṭrāgrakoṭisphuracchailacakra! kramākrāntalokatraya! prabalabhujabaloddhūtagovardhanacchatranivāritākhaṇḍalodyojitākaṇḍacaṇḍāmbuvāhātivarṣatrasadgokulatrāṇavismāpitāśeṣaviśvaprabho! vibudharipuvadhūvargasīmantasindūrasandhyāmayūkhacchaṭonmārjanoddāmadhāmādhipa! trastadaityendravakṣastaṭīpāṭanākuṇṭhabhāsvannakhaśreṇipāṇidvayasrastavistāriraktārṇavāmagnalokatraya! tribhuvanaripukaiṭabhoddaṇḍakaṇṭhāsthikūṭasphuṭonmārjitodāttacakrasphurajjyotirulkāśatoḍḍāmaroddaṇḍa! khaṇḍenducūḍapriya! prauḍhadordaṇḍavibhrāntamanthācalakṣubdhadugdhāmbudhiprotthitaśrībhujavallarīsaṃśleṣasaṃkrāntapīnastanābhogapatrāvalīlāñchitoraḥsthala! sthūlamuktāphalottārahāraprabhāmaṇḍalasphuratkaṇṭha! vaikuṇṭha! bhaktasya lokasya saṃsāramohacchidaṃ dehi bodhodayaṃ deva! tubhyaṃ namaḥ! nirgamanaṃ nāṭayitvā vilokya ca | sādhur, ayam evāsmākaṃ nivāsocito deśaḥ | tad atraiva skandhāvāraṃ niveśayāmaḥ |

milestone.n: iti śrīkṛṣṇamiśraviracite prabodhacandrodayanāmni nāṭake vivekodyogo nāma caturtho 'ṅkaḥ |

sp.speaker: śraddhā
sp.p: vicintya prasiddhaḥ khalv ayaṃ panthāḥ | yataḥ —

lg.l: nirdahati kulam aśeṣaṃ jñātīnāṃ vairasaṃbhavaḥ krodhaḥ, |
vanam iva ghanapavanāhatataruvarasaṅghaṭṭasaṃbhavo dahanaḥ ||

sp.p: sāsram aho! durvāro dāruṇaḥ sodaravyasanajanmā śokānalaḥ; yo vivekajaladhārāśatair api na mandīkriyate! tathā hi —

lg.l: dhruvaṃ dhvaṃso bhāvī jalanidhimahīśailasaritām;ato mṛtyoḥ śīryattṛṇalaghuṣu kā jantuṣu kathā? |
tathāpy uccair bandhuvyasanajanitaḥ ko 'pi viṣamo,vivekapronmāthī, dahati hṛdayaṃ śokadahanaḥ ||

sp.p: yena tathā krūraprakṛtiṣv api bhrātṛṣu kāmakrodhādiṣu kathāśeṣatāṃ gateṣu |

lg.l: nikṛntatīva marmāṇi, dehaṃ śoṣayatīva me, |
dahatīvāntarātmānaṃ krūraḥ śokāgnir ucchikhaḥ ||

sp.p: vicintya ādiṣṭāsmi devyā viṣṇubhaktyā yathā — “vatse, śraddhe! aham atra hiṃsāprāyasamaradarśanaparāṅmukhī | tena vārāṇasīm utsṛjya, sālagrāmābhidhāne bhagavataḥ kṣetre kañcit kālam ativāhayāmi | tvaṃ tu yathāvṛttam samaravṛttāntam āgatya me nivedayiṣyasīti |” tad ahaṃ devyāḥ sakāśaṃ gatvā, sarvam etat samaravṛttāntam āvedayāmi | parikramyāvalokya ca | etac cakratīrtham, yatrāsau saṃsārasāgarottārataraṇikarṇadhāro bhagavān hariḥ svayaṃ prativasati | praṇamya iyaṃ ca mahāmunibhir upāsyamānā bhagavatī viṣṇubhaktiḥ, śāntyā saha kim api mantrayate | yāvad upasarpāmi | iti parikrāmati |

sp.speaker: śāntiḥ
sp.p: devi! prabalacintākulahṛdayām iva bhavatīm ālokayāmi |

sp.speaker: viṣṇubhaktiḥ
sp.p: vatse, etasmin vīravarakṣaye mahati sāmparāye jāte na jānāmi balavatā mahāmohenābhiyuktasya vatsavivekasya kīdṛśo vṛttānta iti | tena duḥsthitam iva me hṛdayam |

sp.speaker: śāntiḥ
sp.p: kim atra vicintyate? nanu bhagavatī cet kṛtānugrahā, tan niyatam eva rājño vivekasya vijaya | iti jānāmi!

sp.speaker: viṣṇubhaktiḥ

lg.head: vatse —
lg.l: yady apy abhyudayaḥ prāyaḥ pramāṇād avadhāryata, |
kāmaṃ tathāpi suhṛdām aniṣṭāśaṅki mānasam ||

sp.p: viśeṣataś ca, śraddhāyāś ciram anāgamanaṃ, manasi saṃdehaṃ āpādayati |

sp.speaker: śraddhā
sp.p: upasṛtya bhagavati! praṇamāmi |

sp.speaker: viṣṇubhaktiḥ
sp.p: śraddhe, svāgatam!

sp.speaker: śraddhā
sp.p: devyāḥ prasādena!

sp.speaker: śāntiḥ
sp.p: amba! praṇamāmi

sp.speaker: śraddhā
sp.p: putri, māṃ pariṣvajasva!

sp.speaker: śraddhā
sp.p: vatse, devyā viṣṇubhakteḥ prasādān, munijanacetaḥpadaṃ prāpnuhi!

sp.speaker: viṣṇubhaktiḥ
sp.p: atha tatra kiṃ vṛttam?

sp.speaker: śraddhā
sp.p: yad devyāḥ prātikūlyam ācaratām ucitam!

sp.speaker: viṣṇubhaktiḥ
sp.p: tad vistareṇāvedaya |

sp.speaker: śraddhā
