sp.p: ākarṇayatu bhavatī | devyām ādikeśavāyatanād apakrāntāyām eva, kiñcid utsṛṣṭapāṭalimni bhagavati bhāsvati, vijayaghoṣaṇāhūyamānānekavaravīrabahulatarasiṃhanādabadhiritadigante, saṃtatarathaturaṅgakhurakhaṇḍitabhūmaṇḍalocchaladvipularajaḥpaṭalāntaritakiraṇamālini, prabalatarakarṇatālāsphālanoccalatsamadakarikumbhasindūrasandhyāyamānadaśadiśi, pralayajaladharadhvānabhīṣanarave, teṣām asmākaṃ ca saṃnaddhe sainyasāgare, mahārājavivekena naiyāyikaṃ darśanaṃ dautye prahitam | gatvā ca tenokto mahāmohaḥ —

lg.l: “viṣṇor āyatanāny apāsya, saritāṃ kūlāny, araṇyasthalīḥpuṇyāḥ, puṇyakṛtāṃ manāṃsi ca, bhavān mlecchān vrajet sānugaḥ |
no cet, santu kṛpāṇadāritabhavatpratyaṅgadhārākṣaradraktasphītavidīrṇavaktravisaratpheṭkāriṇaḥ pheravāḥ ||

sp.speaker: viṣṇubhaktiḥ
sp.p: tatas tataḥ?

sp.speaker: śraddhā
sp.p:
tato, devi, vikaṭalalāṭataṭatāṇḍavitabhrukuṭinā kruddhena mahāmohena, “anubhavatv asya durnayaparipākasya phalaṃ vivekahataka!” ity abhidhāya, svayaṃ pāṣaṇḍāgamāḥ pāṣaṇḍatarkaśāstraiḥ samaṃ samarāya prathamaṃ samudyojitāḥ | atrāntare 'smākam api sainyaśirasi —
saṅkāśakāntiḥ sahasāvirāsīt ||

lg.l: vedopavedāṅgapurāṇadharmaśāstretihāsādibhir ucchritaśrīḥ, |
sarasvatī padmakarā śaśāṅka

sp.speaker: viṣṇubhaktiḥ
sp.p: tatas tataḥ?

sp.speaker: śraddhā
sp.p: tato, devi, vaiṣṇavaśaivasaurādayo devyāḥ sakāśam āgatāḥ |

sp.speaker: viṣṇubhaktiḥ
sp.p: tatas tataḥ?

lg.head: tad anantaraṃ ca —
lg.l: sāṃkhyanyāyakaṇādabhāṣitamahābhāṣyādiśāstrair vṛtā,sphūrjannyāyasahasrabāhunivahair uddyotayantī diśaḥ, |
mīmāṃsā samarotsukāvirabhavad dharmendukāntānanā,vāgdevyāḥ puratas trayītriṇayanā kātyāyanīvāparā ||

sp.speaker: śāntiḥ
sp.p: aye! kathaṃ punaḥ svabhāvapratidvandvinām āgamānāṃ tarkāṇāṃ ca, samavāyaḥ saṃpannaḥ?

sp.speaker: śraddhā

lg.head: putri —
lg.l: samānānvayajātānāṃ, parasparavirodhinām, |
paraiḥ pratyabhibhūtānāṃ, prasūte saṅgatiḥ śriyam ||

sp.p: tena vedaprasūtānāṃ teṣām avāntaravirodhe 'pi, vedasaṃrakṣaṇāya nāstikapakṣapratikṣepaṇāya, śāstrāṇāṃ sāhityam eva | āgamānāṃ tu tattvaṃ vicārayatām avirodha eva | tathā hi —

lg.l: jyotiḥ śāntam anantam advayam ajaṃ, tattadguṇonmīlanād,brahmety, acyuta ity, umāpatir iti, prastūyate naikadhā |
tais tair eva sadāgamaiḥ, śrutisakhair, nānāpathaprasthitair,gamyo 'sau jagadīśvaro, jalanidhir vārāṃ pravāhair iva ||

sp.speaker: viṣṇubhaktiḥ
sp.p: tatas tataḥ?

sp.speaker: śraddhā
sp.p: tato devi, parasparaṃ karituragarathapadātīnāṃ nirantaraśaranikaradhārāsampātopadarśitadurdinānāṃ teṣāṃ asmākaṃ ca yodhānāṃ tumulaḥ samprahāraḥ prāvartata | tathā hi —

lg.l: bahularudhiratoyās tatra tatra sravantyo,nibiḍapiśitapaṅkāḥ kaṅkaraṅkāvakīrṇāḥ, |
śaradalitaviśīrṇottuṅgamātaṅgaśailaskhalitarayaviśīrṇacchatrahaṃsāvataṃsāḥ ||

sp.p:
evam atimahati dāruṇe saṅgrāme, parapakṣavirodhitayā pāṣaṇḍāgamair agresarīkṛtaṃ, lokāyataṃ tantram anyonyasainyavimardair vinaṣṭam | anantaraṃ pāṣaṇḍāgamā nirmūlatayā sadāgamārṇavapravāheṇa paryastāḥ | saugatās tāvat sindhugāndhārapārasikamāgadhāndhrahūṇavaṅgakaliṅgādīn mlecchaprāyān pradeśān praviṣṭāḥ | pāṣaṇḍa
digambarakāpālikādayas tu pāmarabahuleṣu pāñcālamālavābhīrānartasāgarānūpeṣu nigūḍhaṃ sañcaranti | nyāyānugatayā mīmāṃsayā pragāḍhaprahārajarjarīkṛtā nāstikatarkās teṣām evāgamānām anupathaṃ prayātāḥ |

sp.speaker: viṣṇubhaktiḥ
sp.p: tatas tataḥ?

sp.speaker: śraddhā
sp.p: tato vastuvicāreṇa kāmo hataḥ; kṣamayā krodhapāruṣyahiṃsādayo nipātitāḥ; santoṣeṇa lobhatṛṣṇādainyānṛtapaiśunyavāksteyāsatpratigrahādayo nigṛhītāḥ; anasūyayā mātsaryaṃ jitam; parotkarṣabhāvanayā mado niṣūditaḥ; paraguṇādhikyena mānaḥ khaṇḍitaḥ |

sp.speaker: viṣṇubhaktiḥ
sp.p: saharṣam sādhu, sādhu! sampannam! atha mahāmohasya ko vṛttāntaḥ?

sp.speaker: śraddhā
sp.p: devi, mahāmoho 'pi yogopasargaiḥ saha na jñāyate kva nilīnas tiṣṭhatīti |

sp.speaker: viṣṇubhaktiḥ
sp.p: asti tarhi mahān anarthaśeṣaḥ | pariharaṇīyaś cāsau | yataḥ —

lg.l: anādaraparo vidvān, īhamānaḥ sthirāṃ śriyam, |
agneḥ śeṣam, ṛṇāc cheṣaṃ, śatroḥ śeṣaṃ, na śeṣayet ||

sp.p: atha manasaḥ ko vṛttāntaḥ?

sp.speaker: śraddhā
sp.p: devi, tenāpi putrapautrādivyasanajanitaśokāvegena jīvotsargāyādhyavasitam |

sp.speaker: viṣṇubhaktiḥ
sp.p: smitaṃ kṛtvā yady evaṃ syāt, sarva eva vayam kṛtakṛtyā bhavāmaḥ! puruṣaś ca parāṃ nirvṛtim āpadyeta | kintu kutas tasya durātmano jīvatyāgaḥ?

sp.speaker: śraddhā
sp.p: evaṃ devyāṃ prabodhodayāya gṛhītasaṅkalpāyām acirād eva śarīreṇaiva saha na bhaviṣyati |

sp.speaker: viṣṇubhaktiḥ
sp.p: tad bhavatu! asya vairāgyotpattaye vaiyāsikīṃ sarasvatīṃ preṣayāmaḥ |
iti niṣkrānte praveśakaḥ

sp.speaker: manaḥ
sp.p: sāsram hā! putrakāḥ! kva gatāḥ stha? datta me prativacanam! bhoḥ kumārakāḥ! rāgadveṣamadamātsaryādayaḥ, pariṣvajadhvaṃ māṃ! sīdanti mamāṅgāni | hā! na kaścid vṛddhaṃ mām anāthaṃ saṃbhāvayati | kva gatā asūyādayaḥ kanyakāḥ? āśātṛṣṇāhiṃsādayo vā snuṣāḥ? atha tā api mandabhāgyasya me samakālam eva daivahatakenāpahṛtāḥ | savaiklavyam

lg.l: visarpati viṣāgnivad, dahati sarvamarmāvidhas,tanoti bhṛśavedanāḥ, kaṣati sarvakāṣaṃ vapuḥ |
vilumpati vivekitām, hṛdi ca moham unmīlayaty. aho, grasati jīvitaṃ prasabham eṣa śokajvaraḥ ||

sp.speaker: saṅkalpaḥ
sp.p: rājan, samāśvasihi! samāśvasihi!

sp.speaker: manaḥ
sp.p: samāśvasya kathaṃ devīpravṛttir api na mām evamavasthaṃ samāśvāsayati?

sp.speaker: saṅkalpaḥ
sp.p: sāsram deva, kuto 'dyāpi pravṛttiḥ? yataḥ śrutakuṭumbavyasanasañjātaśokānaladagdhahṛdayā, hṛdayāsphoṭaṃ vinaṣṭā |

sp.speaker: manaḥ
sp.p: hā! priye! kvāsi? dehi me prativacanam! nanu, devi —

lg.l: svapne 'pi, devi, ramase na vinā mayā tvaṃ,svāpe tvayā virahito, mṛtavad bhavāmi |
dūrīkṛtāsi vidhidurlalitais, tathāpijīvaty aho! tu mana ity asavo durantāḥ ||

sp.speaker: saṅkalpaḥ
sp.p: rājan, samāśvasihi! samāśvasihi!

sp.speaker: manaḥ
sp.p: samaśvasya alam asmākam ataḥ paraṃ jīvitena | saṃkalpa! citāṃ āracaya, yāvad anala vpra pra veśena śokānalaṃ nirvāpayāmi |

sp.speaker: sarasvatī
sp.p: preṣitāsmi bhagavatyā viṣṇubhaktyā, yathā “sakhi, sarasvati | gacchāpatyavyasanakhinnasya manasaḥ prabodhanāya | yathā ca tasya vairāgyotpattir bhavati tathā yatasveti |” tad bhavatu! tatsannidhim evopasarpāmi | upasṛtya vatsa, kim evam ativiklavo 'si? nanu viditapūrvaiva bhavatā bhāvānām anityatā, adhītāni ca tvayaitihāsikāny upākhyānāni | tathā hi —

lg.l: bhūtvā kalpaśatāyuṣo 'mbujabhuvaḥ sendrāś ca devāsurāmanvādyā munayo mahī jaladhayo naṣṭāḥ parāḥ koṭayaḥ |
mohaḥ ko 'yam aho mahān udayate, lokasya śokāvahaḥ,sindhoḥ phenasame gate vapuṣi yat pañcātmake pañcatām? ||

sp.p: tad bhāvaya bhāvānām anityatām | nityānityavastudarśinaṃ na spṛṣati śokāvegaḥ | yataḥ —

lg.l: ekam eva sadā brahma satyam anyad vikalpitam; |
ko mohas kas tadā śoka ekātmyam anupaśyataḥ? ||

sp.speaker: manaḥ
sp.p: bhagavati! śokāvegadūṣite manasi viveka eva me nāvakāśaṃ labhate |

sp.speaker: sarasvatī
sp.p: vatsa, snehadoṣa eṣaḥ | prasiddha evāyam arthaḥ snehaḥ sarvānarthaprabhava iti | tathā hi —

lg.l: upyante viṣavallibījaviṣamāḥ kleśāḥ priyākhyā narais;tebhyaḥ snehamayā bhavanti nacirād, vajrāgnigarbhāṅkurāḥ |
yebhyo 'mī śataśaḥ kukūlahutabhugdāhaṃ dahantaḥ śanairdehaṃ dīptaśikhāsahasraśikharā rohanti śokadrumāḥ ||

sp.speaker: manaḥ
sp.p: devi! yady apy evaṃ, tathāpi na śaknomi śokānaladagdhaḥ prāṇān dhārayitum | sādhu saṃpannaṃ yad antakāle tvaṃ tāvad dṛṣṭāsi |

sp.speaker: sarasvatī
sp.p: idaṃ cāparam akṛtyaṃ yad ātmahatyādhyavasāya iti | api ca amīṣām apakāriṇām arthe ko 'yam atyāveśo bhavataḥ? paśya tāvat —

lg.l: kva cid upakṛtiḥ kartāmībhiḥ? kṛtā? kriyate 'thavā?tava na ca bhavanty ete puṃsāṃ sukhāya parigrahāḥ |
dadhati virahe marmacchedaṃ, tadartham apārthakaṃ;tad api vipulāyāsaiḥ sīdanty, aho bata! jantavaḥ ||

lg.head: api ca —
lg.l: tīrṇāḥ pūrṇāḥ kati na sarito? laṅghitāḥ ke na śailā?nākrāntā vā kati vanabhuvaḥ, krūrasañcāraghorāḥ? |
pāpair etaiḥ kim iva duritaṃ kārito nāsi kaṣṭaṃ,yad dṛṣṭās te dhanamadamaṣīmlānavaktrā durīśāḥ? ||

sp.speaker: manaḥ
sp.p: devi, evam etat | tathāpi —

lg.l: lālitānāṃ svajātānāṃ hṛdi sañcaratāṃ ciram, |
prāṇānām iva vicchedo, marmacchedād aruntudaḥ ||

sp.speaker: sarasvatī
sp.p: vatsa, mamatāvāsanānibandhano 'yaṃ vyāmohaḥ | uktaṃ ca —

lg.l: mārjārabhakṣite duḥkhaṃ yādṛśaṃ gṛhakukkuṭe, |
na tādṛṅ mamatāśūnye kalaviṅke 'tha mūṣake ||

sp.p: tat sarvathā sarvānarthabījasya mamatvasyocchede yatnaḥ kartavyaḥ | paśya —

lg.l: prādurbhavanti vapuṣa h ḥ kati vā na kīṭāyān yatnataḥ khalu tanor apasārayanti? |
mohaḥ ka eṣa jagato yad apatyasaṃjñāṃteṣāṃ vidhāya pariśoṣayati svadeham? ||

sp.speaker: manaḥ
sp.p: bhagavati! evam tathāpi durucchedyas tu mamatvagranthiḥ | tathā hi —

lg.l: nirantarābhyāsadṛdhīkṛtasyana snehasūtragrathitasya jantoḥ |
jānāmi kiñcid bhagavaty upāyaṃmamatvapāśasya yato vimokṣaḥ ||

sp.speaker: sarasvatī
sp.p: vatsa! bhāvānām anityatābhāvanam eva tāvan mamatvocchedasya prathamopāyaḥ | tathāpi —

lg.l: na kati pitaro dārāḥ putrāḥ pitṛvyapitāmahāmahati vitate saṃsāre 'smin gatās tava koṭayaḥ? |
tad iha suhṛdāṃ vidyutpātojjvalān kṣaṇasaṃgamānsapadi hṛdaye bhūyo, bhūyo! niveśya sukhī bhava ||

sp.speaker: manaḥ
sp.p: bhagavati, tava prasādād apāsta eva vyāmohaḥ | kintu —

lg.l: tava mukhaśaśadharadīdhitigalitair vimalopadeśapīyuṣaiḥ, |
kṣālitam api me hṛdayaṃmalinaṃ śokormibhiḥ kriyate ||

sp.p: tad ārdrasya śokaprahārasya bheṣajam prajñāpayatu, bhagavatī |

sp.speaker: sarasvatī
sp.p: vatsa, nanūpadiṣṭam eva munibhiḥ —

lg.l: “akāṇḍapātajātānām ārdrāṇāṃ marmabhedinām |
gāḍhaśokaprahārāṇām acintaiva mahauṣadham ||” iti ||

sp.speaker: manaḥ
sp.p: bhagavati! evam etat | durvāraṃ tu cetaḥ, yataḥ —

lg.l: apy etad vāritaṃ, cintāsantānair abhibhūyate, |
muhurvātāhatair bimbam abhracchedair ivaindavam ||

sp.speaker: sarasvatī
sp.p: vatsa, śrūyatām | cetaso 'yaṃ vikāraḥ | tataḥ kvacic chānte viṣaye ceto niveśyatām |

sp.speaker: manaḥ
sp.p: tat prasīdatu bhagavatī! ko 'sau śānto viṣayaḥ?

sp.speaker: sarasvatī
sp.p: vatsa, guhyam etat | tathāpy ārtānām upadeśe na doṣaḥ —

lg.l: nityaṃ smarañ jaladanīlam udārahārakeyūrakuṇḍalakirīṭadharaṃ hariṃ vā, |
grīṣme suśītam iva vāri, nirastaśokaṃ,brahma prapadya, bhaja nirvṛtim ātmanīnām ||

sp.speaker: manaḥ
sp.p: vicintya socchvāsam | sarvathā trāto 'smi bhagavatyā | iti pādayoḥ patati |

sp.speaker: sarasvatī
sp.p: vatsa, samprati upadeśasahiṣṇu te hṛdayaṃ jatam | ata etad aparam ucyate —

lg.l: vaśaṃ prāpte mṛtyo h ḥ pitari, tanaye vā, suhṛdi vā,śucā santapyante bhṛśam udaratāḍaṃ jaḍadhiyaḥ |
asāre saṃsāre virasapariṇāme tu viduṣāṃ,viyogo vairāgyaṃ draḍhayati vitanvañ śamasukham ||
asrākṣīn navanīlanīrajadalopāntātisūkṣmāyatatvaṅmātrāntaritāmiṣam yadi vapur naitat prajānāṃ patiḥ, |
pratyagrakṣaradasravisrapiśitagrāsagrahaṃ gṛhṇatogṛdhradhvāṅkṣavṛkāṃs tanau nipatataḥ ko vā kathaṃ vārayet? ||

lg.head: api ca —
lg.l: sadā lolā lakṣmīr — viṣayajarasāḥ, prāntavirasā;vipadgehaṃ deho; mahad api dhanaṃ, bhūri nidhanam; |
guruḥ śoko lokaḥ; satatam abalānarthabahulā —tathāpy, asmin ghore pathi, bata! ratā nātmani ratāḥ ||

sp.speaker: sarasvatī
sp.p: vatsa, etad vairāgyaṃ tvām upasthitam | tad etat saṃbhāvaya |

sp.speaker: manaḥ
sp.p: kvāsi putraka?

sp.speaker: vairāgyam
sp.p: upasṛtya ahaṃ, bho, abhivādaye |

sp.speaker: manaḥ
sp.p: vatsa, jātamātreṇa tvayā tyakto 'smi | pariṣvajasva mām!

sp.speaker: manaḥ
sp.p: vatsa, tvaddarśanāt praśānto me śokāvegaḥ |

sp.speaker: vairāgyam
sp.p: tāta, ko 'tra śokāveśaḥ? yataḥ —

lg.l: pānthānām iva vartmani, kṣitiruhāṃ nadyām iva bhraśyatāṃ,meghānām iva puṣkare, jalanidhau sāṃyātrikāṇām iva, |
saṃyogaḥ pitṛmātṛbandhutanayabhrātṛpriyāṇāṃ yadāsiddho dūraviyoga eva, viduṣāṃ śokodayaḥ kas tadā? ||

sp.speaker: manaḥ
sp.p: sanandam devi, evam etat, yad āha vatsaḥ | saṃprati hi —

lg.l: nāryas tā navayauvanā. madhukaravyāhāriṇas te drumāḥ.pronmīlannavamallikāsurabhayo mandās ta evānilāḥ |
adyodāttavivekamārjitatamaḥstomavyalīkaṃ punastān etān mṛgatṛṣṇikārṇavapayaḥprāyān manaḥ paśyati ||

sp.speaker: sarasvatī
sp.p: vatsa, yady apy evaṃ, tathāpi gṛhiṇā muhūrtam apy anāśramadharmiṇā na bhavitavyam | tad adyaprabhṛti nivṛttir eva te sahadharmacāriṇī |

sp.speaker: manaḥ
sp.p: salajjam yad ādiśati devī |

sp.speaker: sarasvatī
sp.p:
śamadamasantoṣādayaś ca putrās tvām anucarantu! yamaniyamādayaś cāmātyāḥ! viveko 'pi tvadanugrahād upaniṣaddevyā saha yauvarājyam anubhavatu! etāś ca maitryādayaś catasro bhaginyo bhagavatyā viṣṇubhaktyā tava prasādanāya prahitās | tāḥ sa
prasādam anumānaya!

sp.speaker: manaḥ
sp.p: yad ādiśati devī | mūrdhni niveśitāḥ sarvā evājñāḥ | iti saharṣaṃ pādayoḥ patati |

sp.speaker: sarasvatī
sp.p: yamaniyamādayaś cāmātyāḥ sādaram āyuṣmatā draṣṭavyāḥ | etair eva sahāyuṣmān sāmrājyam anutiṣṭhatu | tvayi ca svāsthyam āpanne kṣetrajño 'pi svāṃ prakṛtim āpatsyate | yataḥ —

lg.l: tvatsaṅgāc chāśvato 'pi, prabhavalayajaropapluto, buddhivṛttiṣv eko nāneva, devo ravir iva jaladher vīciṣu vyastamūrtiḥ |
tūṣṇīm ālambase cet, katham api vitatā, vatsa, saṃhṛtya vṛttīr,bhāty ādarśe prasanne ravir iva sahajānandasāndras tadātmā ||

sp.p: tad bhavatu | jñātīnām udakakṛtyāya nadīm avatarāmaḥ |

sp.speaker: manaḥ
sp.p: yad ājñāpayati devī |

milestone.n: iti śrīkṛṣṇamiśraviracite prabodhacandrodayanāmni nāṭake vairāgyaprādurbhāvo nāma pancamo 'ṅkaḥ |

sp.speaker: śāntiḥ
sp.p: ādiṣṭāsmi mahārājavivekena, yathā — “vatse, viditam eva bhavatyā kila —

lg.l: astaṃ gateṣu tanayeṣu, vilīnamohe,vairāgyabhāji manasi praśamaṃ prapanne |
kleśeṣu pañcasu gateṣu samaṃ samīhāṃtattvāvabodham abhitaḥ puruṣas tanoti ||

sp.p: tad bhavatī tvaritataraṃ devīm upaniṣadam anunīya matsakāśam ānayatv” iti | vilokya saharṣam mamāmbā saharṣam kim api mantrayantīta evābhivartate |

sp.speaker: śraddhā
sp.p: aye! adya khalu cireṇa rājakulam avalokya me pīyūṣeṇeva locane pūrṇe!

lg.l: asatāṃ nigraho yatra, santaḥ pūjyā śamādayaḥ |
ārādhyate jagatsvāmī vaśyair devānujīvibhiḥ ||

sp.speaker: śāntiḥ
sp.p: upasṛtyaamba, kiṃ mantrayantī kva prasthitāsi?

sp.speaker: śāntiḥ
sp.p: atha manasi kīdṛśī svāminaḥ puruṣasya pravṛttiḥ?

sp.speaker: śraddhā
sp.p: yādṛśī vadhye nigrāhye ca bhavati |

sp.speaker: śāntiḥ
sp.p: tat kiṃ svāmy eva sāmrājyam alaṃkariṣyati?

sp.speaker: śraddhā
sp.p: evam etat, yady ātmānam pratisaṃdhatte, tato devaḥ svārāṭ samrāḍ vā bhavati |

sp.speaker: śāntiḥ
sp.p: atha devasya māyāyāṃ kīdṛśo 'nugrahaḥ?

sp.speaker: śraddhā
sp.p: nanu “nigraha” iti vaktavye, katham “anugrahaḥ” śakyate vaktum? devo 'pi hi sarvānarthabījam iyaṃ māyā, sarvathā nigrāhyeti manyate |

sp.speaker: śāntiḥ
sp.p: yady evaṃ, kutas tarhīdanīṃ rājakulasya sthitiḥ?

lg.head: śṛṇu, vatse —
lg.l: nityānityavicāraṇā praṇayinī, vairāgyam ekaṃ suhṛt,sanmitrāṇi yamādayaḥ, śamadamaprāyāḥ sakhāyo matāḥ, |
maitryādyāḥ paricārikāḥ, sahacarī nityaṃ mumukṣā, balāducchedyā ripavaś ca — mohamamatāsaṃkalpasaṅgādayaḥ ||

sp.speaker: śāntiḥ
sp.p: atha dharme svāminaḥ kīdṛśaḥ praṇayaḥ?

sp.speaker: śraddhā
sp.p: putri, vairāgyasaṃnikarṣāt prabhṛti nitāntam ihāmutraphalabhogavirasa eva svāmi | tena —

lg.l: sa narakād iva pāpaphalād bhayaṃ bhajati puṇyaphalād api nāśinaḥ; |
iti samujjhitakāmasamanvayaṃ, sukṛtakarma kathañcana manyate ||

sp.p: kintv asau pratyakpravaṇatāṃ svāmino vicintya, kṛtaṃ kartavyam ivātmānaṃ matvā, svayam eva dharmaḥ ślāthavyāpāro 'bhūt |

sp.speaker: śāntiḥ
sp.p: atha yān upasargān gṛhītvā, mahāmoho nilīya sthitas, teṣāṃ ko vṛttāntaḥ?

sp.speaker: śraddhā
sp.p: putri, tathā duravasthāṃ gatenāpi, mahāmohahatakena svāminaḥ prarocanāya madhumatyā vidyayā sahopasargāḥ preṣitāḥ | ayam abhiprāyaḥ, yady eteṣv āsaktaḥ svāmī, viveka upaniṣaccintām api na kariṣyatīti |

sp.speaker: śāntiḥ
sp.p: tatas tataḥ?

sp.speaker: śraddhā
sp.p: tatas tayā saha tair gatvā kāpi svāmina aindrajālikī vidyopadarśitā | tathā hi —

lg.l: śabdān eṣa śṛṇoti yojanaśatād, āvirbhavanti svatastās tā vedapurāṇabhāratakathās tarkādayo vāṅmayāḥ |
grathnāti svayam icchayā śucipadaiḥ śāstrāṇi kāvyāni vā.lokān bhrāmyati, paśyati sphuṭaruco ratnasthalīr mairavīḥ ||

sp.p: madhumatīṃ ca bhūmim āpannaḥ, sthānābhimāninībhir devatābhir upacchandyate — “bho! ihopaviśyatām! nātra janmamṛtyū | anupādhiramaṇīyo deśaḥ, eṣa tvām upasthito vividhavilāsalāvaṇyapuṇyamayo, maṅgalārthavyagrapāṇiḥ, praṇayapeśalo vidyādharījanaḥ | tad ehi! yato 'tra —

lg.l: kanakasikatilasthalāḥ sravantīḥ,pṛthujaghanāḥ kamalānanā varorūḥ, |
marakatadalakomalā vanālirbhaja! nijapuṇyajitāṃś ca sarvabhogān ||

sp.speaker: śāntiḥ
sp.p: tatas tataḥ?

sp.speaker: śraddhā
sp.p: putri, tad ākarṇya, māyayā “ś1āghyam etad” ity uktam | manasā cānumoditam | saṅkalpena protsāhitam | svāmī samprati sanmitrapatham ivāpannaḥ |

sp.speaker: śāntiḥ
sp.p: sakhedam hā dhik! hā dhik! punar api tām eva saṃsāravāgurām api patitaḥ svāmī!

sp.speaker: śraddhā
sp.p: na khalu, na khalu |

sp.speaker: śāntiḥ
sp.p: tatas tataḥ?

sp.speaker: śraddhā
sp.p: tataḥ pārśvavartinā tarkeṇa tān sarvān krodhāveśakaṣāyitanayanam ālokyābhihitaḥ svāmī, “svāmin! kim evam ebhir viṣayāmiṣagrāsagṛdhnubhir āsthānīdhūrtabakaiḥ punar api teṣv eva viṣamaviṣayāṅgāreṣu nipātyamānam ātmānaṃ nāvabudhyase? nanu bhoḥ —

lg.l: bhavasāgaratāraṇāya yāsucirād yogatarīs tvayāśritā |
adhunā parimucya tāṃ madāt,katham aṅgāranadīṃ vigāhase? ||

sp.speaker: śāntiḥ
sp.p: tatas tataḥ?

sp.speaker: śraddhā
sp.p: tatas tad vacanam ākarṇya, “svasti viṣayebhya!” ity abhidhāyāvadhīritā madhumatī |

sp.speaker: śāntiḥ
sp.p: sādhu! sādhu! idānīṃ kva prasthitā bhavatī?

sp.speaker: śraddhā
sp.p: ādiṣṭāhaṃ svāminā yathā, “vivekaṃ draṣṭum icchāmīti |”

sp.speaker: śāntiḥ
sp.p: tat tvaratāṃ bhavatī |

sp.speaker: śraddhā
sp.p: tad ahaṃ rājasannidhiṃ prasthitā |

sp.speaker: śāntiḥ
sp.p: aham api mahārājenopaniṣadam ānetum ādiṣṭā | tad bhavatu! svaniyogaṃ saṃpādayāvaḥ |
iti niṣkrānte praveśakaḥ

sp.speaker: puruṣaḥ
sp.p: vicintya saharṣamaho! māhātmyaṃ devyā viṣṇubhakteḥ! yatprasādān mayā —

lg.l: tīrṇāḥ kleśamahormayaḥ, parihṛtā bhīmā mamatvabhramāḥ.śāntā mitrakalatrabandhumakaragrāhagrahagranthayaḥ |
krodhaurvāgnir apākṛto, vighaṭitās tṛṣṇālatāvistarāḥ.pāretīram avāptakalpam adhunā saṃsāravārām nidheḥ ||

sp.speaker: upaniṣat
sp.p: sakhi! kathaṃ tathā niranukrośasya svāmino mukham ālokayiṣyāmi? yenāham itarajanayoṣeva suciram ekākinī parityaktā |

sp.speaker: śāntiḥ
sp.p: devi, kathaṃ tathāvidhavipatpatito deva upālabhyate?

sp.speaker: upaniṣat
sp.p: sakhi, na dṛṣṭā tvayā me tādṛśī avasthā, yenaivaṃ bravīsi | śṛṇu —

lg.l: bāhvor bhagnā dalitamaṇayaḥ śreṇayaḥ kaṅkaṇānāṃ,cūḍāratnagrahanikṛtibhir dūṣitaḥ keśapāśaḥ |
kaiḥ kair nāhaṃ hatavidhibalād īhitā durvidagdhairdāsīkartuṃ sapadi duritair dūrasaṃsthe viveke ||

sp.speaker: śāntiḥ
sp.p: sarvam etan mahāmohasya durvilasitam | nātra devasyāparādhaḥ | tena hi tathā manaḥ kāmādidvāreṇa prabodhayatā tvatto dūrīkṛto vivekaḥ | etad eva kulastrīṇāṃ naisargikaṃ śīlaṃ yad vipanmagnasya svāminaḥ samayapratīkṣaṇam iti | tad ehi darśanena priyālāpena sambhāvaya devam | saṃpraty apahatā vidviṣaḥ | saṃpūrṇās te manorathāḥ |

sp.speaker: upaniṣat
sp.p: sakhi, saṃpraty āgacchantī vatsayā gītayāhaṃ rahasy uktā yathā “bhartā svāmī ca puruṣas tvayā yathāpraśnam uttareṇa saṃbhāvayitavyaḥ, yathā prabodhotpattir bhaviṣyatīti” tat kathaṃ gurūṇām adhyakṣaṃ dhārṣṭyam avalambiṣye |

sp.speaker: śāntiḥ
sp.p: devi, avicāraṇīyam etad vākyam bhagavatyā gītāyāḥ | ayam eva cārtho devyā bhagavatyā viṣṇubhaktyā vivekasvāmino niruktaḥ | tad ehi | sambhāvaya darśanena bhartāram ādipuruṣaṃ ca |

sp.speaker: upaniṣat
sp.p: yathā vadati priyasakhī | iti parikrāmati

sp.speaker: rājā
sp.p: ayi vatse! api drakṣyati śāntiḥ priyām upaniṣadam?

sp.speaker: śraddhā
sp.p: deva! gṛhītoddeśaiva śāntir gatā, kathaṃ tām na drakṣyati?

sp.speaker: rājā
sp.p: katham iva?

sp.speaker: śraddhā
sp.p: deva, prāg eva kathitam etad devyā viṣṇubhaktyāsīt, yathā mandarābhidhāne śaile viṣṇor āyatane devyā gītāyā saha tarkavidyābhayād anupraviṣṭeti |

sp.speaker: rājā
sp.p: kathaṃ punas tarkavidyābhayam?

sp.speaker: śraddhā
sp.p: deva, tam etam arthaṃ saiva prastoṣyati | tad āgacchatu devaḥ | eṣa svāmī tvadāgamanam eva dhyāyan vivikte vartate |

sp.speaker: rājā
sp.p: upasṛtya svāmin, abhivādaye!

sp.speaker: puruṣaḥ
sp.p: vatsa, kramaviruddho 'yaṃ samudācāraḥ | yato jñānavṛddhatayā bhavān evāsmākam upadeśadānena pitṛbhāvam āpannaḥ | kutaḥ —

lg.l: purā hi dharmādhvani naṣṭasaṃjñā,devās tam arthaṃ tanayān apṛcchan |
jñānena samyak parigṛhya te vai,“he putrakāḥ! saṃśṛṇutety” avocan ||

sp.p: tad bhavān pitṛtvenāsmāsu vartatām ity eṣa eva dharmaḥ |

sp.speaker: śāntiḥ
sp.p: eṣa devi, devena saha svāmī vivikte vartate | tad upasarpatu, devī |

sp.speaker: śāntiḥ
sp.p: svāmin! eṣopaniṣaddevī pādavandanāyāgatā |

sp.speaker: puruṣaḥ
sp.p: na khalu! na khalu! yato māteyam asmākaṃ tattvāvabodhodayena | tad eṣaivāsmākaṃ namasyā! athavā —

lg.l: anugrahavidhau devyā mātuś ca mahad antaram; |
mātā gāḍhaṃ nibadhnāti, bandhaṃ devī nikṛntati ||

sp.speaker: puruṣaḥ
sp.p: amba, kathyatām, kva bhavatyā nītā ete divasāḥ?

lg.head: svāmin —
lg.l: nītāny amūni maṭhacatvaraśūnyadevāgāreṣu mūrkhamukharaiḥ saha vāsarāṇi ||

sp.speaker: puruṣaḥ
sp.p: atha te jānanti kim api bhavatyās tattvam?

sp.speaker: upaniṣat
sp.p: na khalu, na khalu! kiṃtu —

lg.l: te svecchayā mama girāṃ draviḍāṅganoktavācām ivārtham avicārya vikalpayanti ||

sp.p: tena kevalaṃ teṣāṃ parārthaharaṇaprayojanam eva madvicāraṇam |

sp.speaker: puruṣaḥ
sp.p: tatas tataḥ?

lg.head: tataḥ, kadā cit —
lg.l: kṛṣṇājināgnisamidājyajuhūsruvādipātrais tatheṣṭipaśusomamukhair makhaiś ca, |
dṛṣṭā mayā parivṛtākhilakarmakāṇḍavyādiṣṭapaddhatir athādhvani yajñavidyā ||

sp.speaker: puruṣaḥ
sp.p: tatas tataḥ?

sp.speaker: upaniṣat
sp.p: tato mayā cintitam, “api nāmaiṣā pustakabhāravāhinī me jñāsyati tattvam” iti, ata evāsyāḥ sannidhau kānicid vāsarāṇi nayāmi |

sp.speaker: puruṣaḥ
sp.p: tatas tataḥ?

sp.speaker: upaniṣat
sp.p: tatas, tām aham upasthitā, tayā cāham uktāsmi — “bhadre, kiṃ te samīhitam?” iti | tato mayoktam, “ārye! anāthāsmi | tvayi nivastum icchāmīti |”

sp.speaker: puruṣaḥ
sp.p: tatas tataḥ?

sp.speaker: upaniṣat
sp.p: tatas tayoktaṃ, “bhadre! kiṃ te karmeti?” tato mayoktam —

lg.l: “yasmād viśvam udeti, yatra ramate, yasmin punar līyate —bhāṣā yasya jagad vibhāti, sahajānandojjvalaṃ yanmahaḥ; |
śāntaṃ, śāśvatam, akriyaṃ, yam apunarbhāvāya bhūteśvaraṃdvaitadhvāntam apāsya yānti kṛtinaḥ — prastaumi taṃ pūruṣam” ||

sp.p: yajñavidyā vicintya —

lg.l: “pumān akartā katham īśvaro bhavet?kriyā bhavocchedakarī na vastudhīḥ |
kurvan kriyā eva naro bhavacchidaḥ,śataṃ samāḥ śāntamanā jijīviṣet ||

sp.p: “tan manye nātiprayojanaṃ bhavatyāḥ parigraheṇa | tathāpi yadi kartāraṃ bhoktāraṃ puruṣaṃ stuvantī kiyantaṃ kālam atra vastum icchasi ko doṣaḥ?”

sp.speaker: rājā
sp.p:
sopahāsam aho! dhūmāndhakāraśyāmalitadṛśo duṣprajñatvaṃ yajñavidyāyāḥ, yenaivaṃ kutarkopahatā! yataḥ —
ty acetanaṃ cumbakasannidhāv iva, |

lg.l: ayaḥ svabhāvād acalaṃ balāc cala
tanoti viśvekṣitur īkṣiteritājaganti māyeśvarateyam īśituḥ ||

sp.p: tasmāt tamo'ndhānām eveyam anīśvaradṛṣṭiḥ | abodhaprabhavaṃ ca saṃsāraṃ karmabhiḥ śamayantī yajñavidyā nūnam andhatamasam andhakāreṇāpaninīṣati!

lg.l: svabhāvalīnāni, tamomayāni,prakāśayed yo bhuvanāni sapta, |
tam eva vidvān atimṛtyum eti,nānyo 'sti panthā bhavamuktihetuḥ ||

sp.speaker: puruṣaḥ
sp.p: tatas tataḥ?

sp.speaker: upaniṣat
sp.p: tato yajñavidyayā vimṛśyoktam, “sakhi! tvatsaṃnikarṣād durvāsanopahatair asmadantevāsibhiḥ karmasu ślathādarair bhavitavyam | tat prasīdatu bhavatī svābhilaṣitadeśagamanāya |”

sp.speaker: puruṣaḥ
sp.p: tatas tataḥ?

sp.speaker: upaniṣat
sp.p: tato 'haṃ tām atikramya prasthitā |

sp.speaker: puruṣaḥ
sp.p: tatas tataḥ?

sp.speaker: upaniṣat
sp.p: tataḥ karmakāṇḍavicāriṇī sahacarī mīmāṃsā mayā dṛṣṭā —

lg.l: vibhidya karmāṇy, adhikārabhāñji,śrutyādibhiś cānugatā pramāṇaiḥ; |
aṅgair vicitrair abhiyojayantīprāptopadeśair atideśakaiś ca ||

sp.speaker: puruṣaḥ
sp.p: tatas tataḥ?

sp.speaker: upaniṣat
sp.p: tato 'haṃ tām api tathaivāśrayam abhyarthitavatī | atha tayāpy uktāsmi “bhadre, kiṃ karmāsīti?” tato mayā tad eva “yasmād viśvam” ityādi paṭhitam |

sp.speaker: puruṣaḥ
sp.p: tatas tataḥ?

sp.speaker: upaniṣat
sp.p:
tato mīmāṃsayā pārśvavartināṃ mukham ālokyābhihitam, “asty evāsmākam lokāntaraphalopabhogayogyapuruṣopanayanenopayogaḥ | tat dhriyatām karmopayukteti!” tatra teṣām madhye kenāpy antevāsinaitad anumoditam eva | apareṇa tu prasiddhapratiṣṭhena mīmāṃsāhṛdayādhidaivatena kumārilasvāminoktaṃ — “devi! neyaṃ karmopayuktaṃ puruṣam upanayati | kintu akartāram, abhoktāram, īśvaram, na cāsāv īśvaraḥ karmasūpayujyate |”
athāpareṇoktam, “atha kiṃ laukikāt puruṣād anya īśvaro nāmāsti?” tatas tena vihasya punar uktam, “asti | tathā hi —

lg.l: ekaḥ paśyati ceṣṭitāni jagatām, anyas tu mohāndhadhīr.ekaḥ karmaphalāni vāñchati, dadāty anyas tu tāny arthine |
ekaḥ karmasu śiṣyate, tanubhṛtāṃ śāstaiva devo 'paro.niḥsaṅgaḥ puruṣaḥ kriyāsu sa kathaṃ karteti saṃbhāvyate ||

sp.speaker: rājā
sp.p: saharṣam sādhu kumārilasvāmin, sādhu! prājño 'sy, āyuṣmān bhava!

lg.l: “dvau tau suparṇau sayujau sakhāyausamānavṛkṣaṃ pariṣasvajāte |
ekas tayoḥ pippalam atti pakvam,anyas tv anaśnann abhicākaśīti ||

sp.speaker: puruṣaḥ
sp.p: tatas tataḥ?

sp.speaker: upaniṣat
sp.p: tato 'haṃ mīmāṃsām abhimantrya prasthitā |

sp.speaker: puruṣaḥ
sp.p: tatas tataḥ?

sp.speaker: upaniṣat
sp.p: tato mayā bahubhiḥ śiṣyair upāsyamānās tarkavidyā avalokitāḥ |

lg.l: kācid dvitriviśeṣakalpanaparā, nyāyaiḥ parā tanvatīvādaṃ sacchalajātinigrahamayair jalpaṃ vitaṇḍām api |
anyā tu prakṛter vibhajya puruṣasyodāharantī bhidāṃtattvānāṃ gaṇanāparā mahadahaṃkārādisargakramaiḥ ||

sp.speaker: puruṣaḥ
sp.p: tatas tataḥ?

sp.speaker: upaniṣat
sp.p: tathaivāham tāḥ samupasthitā | tābhiś cānuyuktayā mayā tad eva karmopāhṛtam “yasmād viśvam” ityādi | tatra tābhiḥ saprakāśopahāsam uktam, “āḥ vācāle! paramāṇubhyo viśvam utpadyate | nimittakāraṇam īśvaraḥ |” anyayā tu sakrodham uktam, “āḥ pāpe! katham īśvaram eva vikāriṇam kṛtvā vināśadharmiṇam upapādayasi? nanu re pradhānād viśvotpattiḥ |”

sp.speaker: rājā
sp.p:
aho! durmatayas tarkavidyā etad api na jānanti! sarvaṃ prameyajātam ghaṭādivat kāryam iti, paramāṇupradhānopādānakāraṇam apy upekṣaṇīyam eveti | api ca —
ajñāte prabhavaty, athāstam ayate tattvāvabodhodayāt ||

lg.l: ambhaḥśītakarāntarikṣanagarasvapnendrajālādivat,kāryaṃ meyam asatyam etad, udayadhvaṃsādiyuktaṃ jagat; |
śuktau rūpyam iva, srajīva bhujagaḥ, svātmāvabodhe harāv

sp.p: vikāraśaṅkā tu mugdhavadhūnāṃ vilasitam iva | tathā hi —

lg.l: śāntaṃ jyotiḥ katham anuditānastanityaprakāśaṃviśvotpattau vrajati vikṛtiṃ niṣkalaṃ nirmalaṃ ca? |
śaśvan nīlotpaladalarucām ambuvāhāvalīnāṃprādurbhāve bhavati viyataḥ kīdṛśo vā vikāraḥ? ||

sp.speaker: puruṣaḥ
sp.p: sādhu! sādhu! prīṇayati mānasaṃ mamāyaṃ prajñāvato vimarśaḥ | upaniṣadaṃ prati tatas tataḥ?

sp.speaker: upaniṣat
sp.p: tatas tābhiḥ sarvābhir eva kruddhābhir uktam, “aho! viśvavilayena muktim eṣā vadantī! nāstikapathaṃ prasthitā nigṛhyatām!” iti | tataḥ sasaṃrambhaṃ māṃ nigrahītuṃ pradhāvitāḥ sarvāḥ |

sp.speaker: puruṣaḥ
sp.p: satrāsam tatas tataḥ?

sp.speaker: upaniṣat
sp.p: tato 'haṃ satvarataraṃ parikramya daṇḍakāraṇyaṃ praviṣṭā | tato mandaraśailopakalpitasya madhusūdanāyatanasya nātidure —

lg.l: bāhvor bhagnā dalitamaṇaya h ḥ śreṇayaḥ kaṅkaṇānāṃ,cūḍāratnagrahanikṛtibhir dūṣitaḥ keśapāśaḥ |
chinnā muktāvalir, apahṛtam, srastam aṅgād dukūlam,bhītā gītāśramam atha galannūpurāhaṃ praviṣṭā ||

sp.speaker: puruṣaḥ
sp.p: tatas tataḥ?

sp.speaker: upaniṣat
sp.p: tato devāyatanān nirgatya, daṇḍapāṇibhiḥ puruṣair atinirdayam tāḍyamānās, tā digantam atikrāntāḥ sarvāḥ |

sp.speaker: rājā
sp.p: saharṣam na khalu bhavatīm atikrāmato bhagavān viśvasākṣī kṣamate |

sp.speaker: puruṣaḥ
sp.p: tatas tataḥ?

sp.speaker: upaniṣat
sp.p: tatra ca vatsayā gītayā māṃ tatrāgatām avalokya, sasaṃbhramaṃ, “mātar! mātar!” iti parirabhyopaveśitāsmi | viditavṛttāntayā tayā coktam, “amba, nātra khedayitavyaṃ manaḥ | ye khalu tvām apramāṇīkṛtya, yatheṣṭam asurasattvāḥ pracariṣyanti, teṣām īśvara eva śāstā | uktaṃ ca tena bhagavatā tān adhikṛtya —

lg.l: “tān ahaṃ dviṣataḥ krūrān, saṃsāreṣu narādhamān, |
kṣipāmy ajasram aśubhān āsurīṣv eva yoniṣu” ||

sp.speaker: puruṣaḥ
sp.p: sakautukam devi, tvatprasādāj jñātum icchāmi ko 'yam īśvaro nāmeti?

sp.speaker: upaniṣat
sp.p: sasmitam ko nāmātmānam ajānantam pratyuttaraṃ dāsyati?

sp.speaker: puruṣaḥ
sp.p: saharṣam katham mamātmā parameśvaraḥ?

lg.head: evam etat | tathā hi —
lg.l: asau tvadanyo na sanātanaḥ pumān,bhavān na devāt puruṣottamāt paraḥ |
sa eva bhinnas tadanādimāyayā,dvidheva bimbaṃ salile vivasvataḥ ||

sp.speaker: puruṣaḥ
sp.p: vivekaṃ prati bhagavan, uktam apy arthaṃ bhagavatyā na samyag avadhārayāmi |

lg.l: avachinnasya bhinnasya, jarāmaraṇadharmiṇaḥ, |
mama bravīti devīyaṃ nityānandacidātmatām ||

sp.speaker: vivekaḥ
sp.p: padārthāparijñānād ayaṃ vākyārthānavabodhas |

sp.speaker: puruṣaḥ
sp.p: tadavabodhāya bhagavān upāyam ājñāpayatu |

lg.head: ayam ucyate —
lg.l: eṣo 'smīti vivicya, netipadataś cittena sārdhaṃ kṛte,tattvānāṃ vilaye cidātmani parijñāte tvamarthe punaḥ, |
śrutvā tat tvam asīti, bādhitabhavadhvāntaṃ, tad ātmaprabhaṃ,śāntaṃ jyotir anantam antaruditānandaṃ samuddyotate ||

sp.speaker: nididhyāsanam
sp.p: ādiṣṭo 'smi bhagavatyā viṣṇubhaktyā yathā, “nigūḍham asmadabhiprāyam upaniṣad vivekena saha bodhayitavyā | tvayā ca puruṣeṇa vastavyam” iti | vilokya eṣā devī vivekapuruṣābhyāṃ nātidūre vartate | yāvad upasarpāmi | upasṛtya upaniṣadaṃ prati janāntikam | devyā viṣṇubhaktyā samādiṣṭaṃ yathā — “saṃkalpayonayo devatā bhavanti | mayā ca samādhānena viditaṃ tathā āpannasattvā bhavatīti | tatra ca krūrasattvā vidyā nāma kanyā tvadudare vartate prabodhacandraś ca | tatra vidyāṃ saṅkarṣaṇavidyayā manasi saṅkrāmayiṣyasi | prabodhacandraṃ puruṣe samarpya vatsavivekena saha matsamīpam āgamiṣyasīti |”

sp.speaker: upaniṣat
sp.p: yad ādiśati mahādevī | iti vivekam ādāya niṣkrāntā |

sp.speaker: (nepathye)
sp.p: āścaryam! āścaryam!

lg.l: uddāmadyutidāmabhis taḍid iva pradyotayantī diśaḥ,pratyagrasphuṭadutkaṭāsthi manaso nirbhidya vakṣaḥsthalam, |
kanyeyaṃ sahasā samaṃ parikarair mohaṃ grasantī, bhajaty antardhānam, upaiti caikapuruṣaṃ śrīmān prabodhodayaḥ ||

sp.p: prabodhacandraḥ —

lg.l: kiṃ vāptaṃ? kim apohitaṃ? kim uditaṃ? kiṃ vā samutsāritaṃ?syūtaṃ kiṃ nu? vilāyitaṃ nu? kim idaṃ? kiñcin na vā kiñcana? |
yasminn abhyudite vitarkapadavīṃ naivaṃ samārohatitrailokyaṃ sahajaprakāśadalitaṃ so 'haṃ prabodhodayaḥ ||

sp.p: parikramya eṣa puruṣaḥ | yāvad upasarpāmi | upasṛtya bhagavan, prabodhacandro 'ham abhivādaye!

sp.speaker: puruṣaḥ
sp.p: sāhlādam ehi putra! pariṣvajasva mām!

sp.speaker: puruṣaḥ
sp.p:
āliṅgya sānandam aho! vighaṭitatimirapaṭalaṃ saṃjātam! tathā hi —
unmathya, ko 'py ajani bodhatuṣāraraśmiḥ |

lg.l: mohāndhakāram avadhūya, vikalpanidrām
śraddhāvivekamatiśāntiyamādi yenaviśvātmakaḥ sphurati — viṣṇur ahaṃ sa eṣaḥ ||

sp.p: sarvathā kṛtakṛtyo 'smi bhagavatyā viṣṇubhakteḥ prasādāt | so 'ham idānīm —

lg.l: saṅge na kenacid upetya, kam apy apṛcchan,gacchann atarkitaphalaṃ vidiśaṃ diśaṃ vā, |
śānto vyapetabhayaśokakaṣāyamohaḥ,sāyaṃ gṛhe munir ahaṃ bhavitāsmi sadyaḥ ||

sp.speaker: viṣṇubhaktiḥ
sp.p: saharṣam upasṛtya cireṇa khalv asmākaṃ saṃpannāḥ sarve manorathāḥ, yena praśāntārātiṃ bhavantam avalokayāmi |

sp.speaker: puruṣaḥ
sp.p: devyā viṣṇubhakteḥ prasādāt kiṃ nāma duṣkaram? iti pādayoḥ patati |

sp.speaker: viṣṇubhaktiḥ
sp.p: puruṣam utthāpayati | uttiṣṭha, vatsa | kiṃ te bhūyaḥ priyam upaharāmi?

sp.speaker: puruṣaḥ
sp.p: kiṃ ataḥ param api priyam asti? yataḥ —

lg.l: pūrvaṃ tāvad vivekapramukhanijabalair nirjite sānubandhemohe 'smākaṃ kulārau; tadanu samudite hanta vairāgyayoge |
śāntiśraddhādiyatnāt punar upaniṣadā sādhitāt samprayogād,asmābhis tvatprasādād dhruvam ayam adhunā labdha eva prabodhaḥ ||
saṃsārāpārasindhuplavakuśalamahākarṇadhāre murāraubhaktir mukteḥ parā sā prasaratu jananī sārvakālaṃ janasya! |
kiñcānyat svaprakāśaṃ parataram amalajyotir ānandasāndraṃśāntātmāno munīndrāḥ pramuditamanasaḥ santataṃ bhāvayantu! ||
praśāntārātir agamad vivekaḥ kṛtakṛtyatām, |
nīrajaske sadānande pade cāhaṃ niveśitaḥ ||

sp.p: tathāpīdam astu!

lg.l: parjanyo 'smin jagati mahatīṃ vṛṣṭim iṣṭāṃ vidhattāṃ |
rājānaḥ kṣmāṃ galitavividhopaplavāṃ pālayantu |
tattvonmeṣāpahatatamasas tvatprasādān mahāntaḥsaṃsārābdhiṃ viṣayamamatātaṅkapaṅkaṃ tarantu ||

milestone.n: iti śrīkṛṣṇamiśraviracite prabodhacandrodayanāmni nāṭake jīvanmuktir nāma ṣaṣṭho 'ṅkaḥ |
